title: CashScript-Py: A Python SDK for CashScript
description: BriefA Python SDK for CashScript opens up the world of BCH smart contracts to one of the world’s most popular programming languages. There is existing SDK support for front-end developers, which helps them develop user-facing website dapps for instance; but there is a lack of this kind of support for server-side tools, like for automated DeFi trading bots, typically written using Python. This project aims to fill this gap in developer support and make viable an entire category of applications.BackgroundA Standard Development Kit (SDK) for CashScript is a tool for developers that helps make working with BCH smart contracts simple and clear. It allows developers to focus on the details of the contracts themselves, without needing to worry about onerous tasks like communicating with the BCH P2P network, or properly formulating and transmitting the low level raw BCH script, among other burdens. Currently, only TypeScript developers have such an SDK available to them; the TypeScript-based “CashScript SDK” from https://cashscript.org. But since Python often tops charts of the most popular programming languages, and especially given that multiple Python developers have already been asking for a way to interact with Cauldron and AnyHedge smart contracts using Python, we propose to build an alternative Python SDK to serve this valuable additional audience.Electron Cash and its plugins are written in Python. So, a Python SDK would significantly simplify development of smart-contract-related Electron Cash plugins and will hopefully lead to many such plugins appearing in the near future.Mathieu Geukens established the CashScript-Py project: https://github.com/mr-zwets/cashscript-py. It is based on earlier work by Jonald Fyookball on his AnyHedge Electron Cash plugin: https://github.com/fyookball/anyhedge-ec-plugin. Both Mathieu and Rosco Kalis have helped put the present project in motion and are excited to see CashScript-Py get completed!ScopeThe plan is to flesh out CashScript-Py SDK, to ultimately approach the breadth of support provided by the CashScript SDK: https://github.com/CashScript/cashscript/tree/master/packages/cashscript, and provide documentation similar to: https://cashscript.org/docs/sdk/instantiation.Several bits of functionality in the current TypeScript SDK rely on Libauth (https://github.com/bitauth/libauth) and the electrum-cash (https://www.npmjs.com/package/electrum-cash) library. Neither of these are available for a Python SDK however, given that they are JavaScript libraries. So in such places there might be a lot of work necessary to produce alternative Python-based capabilities (if not available to borrow from other projects like BitCash: https://github.com/pybitcash/bitcash). The plan is not to attempt to reproduce some of the most advanced aspects of the CashScript SDK, such as advanced debugging capabilities or alternative network providers, unless time allows.Who am I?I am Andrew#128⚽️, a contributor to BCHN and Electron Cash. I played a major part in building CashTokens support into both the desktop and the Android Electron Cash wallets - both of which make significant use of Python. I can be contacted on Telegram. For this project, I plan to do all of the heavy lifting, with occasional counsel from Mathieu.ProposalI request 25 BCH (approx $10,000 at current prices) to fund this work, with an estimated timeframe for delivery at 3 months.

title: PAPER WALLET DEPLOYMENT STRATEGY FOR DIGITAL CASH
description: Support Electronic Cash Adoption in Spokane—Fund a Paper Wallet, Spark Real-World Use!Electronic cash is an incredible tool for fast, low-cost transactions, and we believe the best way to drive adoption is by putting it directly into the hands of local businesses. That’s why we’re launching a campaign to distribute funded electronic cash paper wallets—powered by Bitcoin Cash (BCH)—to businesses in Spokane. These wallets give business owners not just an introduction to electronic cash, but real motivation to start accepting it. Why Paper Wallets?An electronic cash paper wallet is a simple, tangible way for newcomers to experience cryptocurrency without needing technical knowledge. It contains a QR code with a preloaded electronic cash balance, making it easy for a business owner to scan and start using immediately. By receiving a funded wallet, they’re not just learning about digital currency—they’re becoming invested in it. How Your Support HelpsYour donation directly funds these paper wallets, each loaded with a small amount of electronic cash. These wallets will be handed out to local businesses, coffee shops, and entrepreneurs, giving them a reason to explore electronic cash as a real payment option. Many businesses hesitate to adopt crypto because they’ve never used it—this campaign removes that hesitation by giving them a head start with Bitcoin Cash, the leading form of peer-to-peer electronic cash. The Ripple EffectWhen a business receives a funded electronic cash wallet, they’re naturally inclined to learn how to use it, accept it, and even spend it. This creates a growing network of electronic cash users in Spokane, strengthening its role as a local currency and making it more useful for everyone. Your contribution doesn’t just support adoption—it kickstarts a movement.Every dollar you donate goes directly toward loading wallets that will be placed in the hands of real businesses. Help us turn Spokane into an electronic cash-friendly city—one paper wallet at a time! Donate now and be a part of real Bitcoin Cash adoption through electronic cash in Spokane! Facebook group:https://www.facebook.com/groups/1637045700507484bitcoincashpnw@gmail.com

title: Support CashTokens in Trezor's BlockBook indexer
description: Hey everyone, Mathieu Geukens suggested to look into BlockBook for BCH CashTokens integration. BlockBook is an indexer software developed by Trezor, a blockchain company which created the Trezor hardware wallet. It is also used by other platforms such as Edge Wallet, Trust Wallet and Exodus wallet, which all can benefit from our contribution.BlockBook is a multicoin indexer written in Go programming language. It already does support BCH as a native currency, so we are not building from scratch. It also does support tokens on other blockchains such as Ethereum, both fungible and nonfungible, which share many properties with CashTokens. CashTokens, however, have their distinct properties and special metadata handling - BCMR spec - which needs to be implemented in the core software. Also BlockBook fetches the pricing data from external sources, and we are going to support fetching CashTokens prices from Cauldron DEX.Here is the breakdown of action items we are going to assess and their costs:* Research the codebase and database structure, build and test systems, identify the relevant points to support CashTokens - 10 BCH* Support indexing CashTokens - 35 BCH* Support the BCMR spec for off-chain token metadata lookups from ipfs, websites, DSN-resolved registries, token pricing - 20 BCH* Quality assurance and support for any bugs found in software - 5 BCH* Indexer server hosting and support - 5 BCH (2.5 BCH per year for 2 years)* Fundme fee - 1 BCHWe aim to raise 76 BCH for this work. Any extra funds raised will contribute to a longer term support and hosting of the BlockBook indexer.Contact: https://t.me/mainnet_patTelegram group: https://t.me/BlockBookCT

title: Platinum Esports & AFoG Exhibition
description: Contents1 - About Me & Proof of Work2 - Platinum Esports and Backstory3 - Phase 0 - Fundraiser4 - Phase 1 - CSLAN 3 in Chicago5 - Phase 2 - AFoG Exhibition6 - Phase 3 - Possible partnership7 - Get Involved1 - About Me & Proof of WorkMy name is David Shattuck. I was a BTC enthusiast from 2013-2017 but I switched to BCH on day 1 and have been active in this community ever since.I'm the creator of both A Fifth of Gaming (a video game tournament platform that runs exclusively on BCH) and BitcoinCashClient (the nuget library enabling BCH payments that AFoG uses to talk to the blockchain).I've made guest appearances on the Bitcoin Cash Podcast (twice) and Being Built talking about AFoG:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yadskoNfbwIhttps://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EDFdSPGvnX0https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-3iXgm-0GikI also popped up at BCH Bliss 1 and 2:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6cn4dcdN7d4https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2TIxkLJvR3QI am an enthusiast for on-boarding new users to BCH and have a documented public history of doing so:https://youtu.be/lOinyikpaZI?t=3038https://x.com/davidshattuck8/status/1919489892989714575https://x.com/davidshattuck8/status/1750620478845108280https://x.com/davidshattuck8/status/1818061220718555624AFoG is my favorite medium to reach out to other communities (gamers) to introduce them to BCH in a fun way. It is not possible to play in an AFoG tournament without providing a BCH address for your winnings to be sent to, and players coming from outside the BCH world cannot provide an address without creating a wallet. AFoG has run hundreds of tournaments for thousands of registrants and paid out more than 33 BCH while sending or receiving ~5800 BCH transactions over the past 2 years. It has hosted events for a diversity of games including Magic: The Gathering, Starcraft 2, Street Fighter II, and Chess, with the large portion of payouts going to people who have never used BCH before (when MTGA players and BCH enthusiasts play competitive Magic, the MTGA players tend to take home the prizes):https://afifthofgaming.com/Session/Detail/1167https://afifthofgaming.com/Session/Detail/914https://afifthofgaming.com/Session/Detail/1483https://afifthofgaming.com/Session/Detail/1136We have an opportunity here to introduce a new community to BCH, make some new gamer friends, and watch some next level StarCraft action.I can be contacted directly via X - @davidshattuck82 - Platinum Esports and BackstoryPlatinum Esports is a gaming community built around StarCraft: Brood War, Starcraft 2, and Tekken 8. They have a calendar of mostly self-funded tournaments ranging from minor monthly events to qualifiers to major once-per-year championships. They stream their events (twitch.tv/PlatEsports) complete with live commentary and seem to have an active and enthusiastic community.I was introduced to Airn, one of their principle organizers, by Jerry Qian of OPTN Labs and Bitcoin Bay. My conversation with Airn was the catalyst for this fundraiser and he and I are both on-board with the plan sketched out here.3 - Phase 0 - FundraiserWe're asking the BCH community for 2 BCH. If this campaign is successful, the funds will go to two places:First, $350 worth of BCH will be put into AnyHedge using BCH Bull to stabilize its value against the dollar for a couple of months. After which it will be used in Phase 1 below.Second, the remaining BCH will be put into the vault of Power Overwhelming (the Starcraft 2 AFoG guild created by me and Jeremy of the Bitcoin Cash Podcast back in Oct 2023). Those funds will be used in phases 2 and 3 below.4 - Phase 1 - CSLAN 3 in ChicagoOne of the premier events of Platinum Esports is their annual Chat StarLAN event. The 2025 edition of CSLAN is taking place in Chicago in August.Not only is this an in-person LAN party, it's also the championship round of their CSLPRO Starcraft Remastered series. Players compete in monthly and quarterly qualifiers throughout the season to score points and earn a spot at this major event.If this fundraiser is successful, AFoG (and specifically the exhibition discussed below) will become a sponsor of that event, paying out $350 worth of BCH to the 5th-8th place finishers.In addition to having the opportunity to remix the legendary Bitcoin/Starcraft meme, we will also receive some logo placements and on-stream shoutouts inviting players and viewers to participate in the exhibition event. Airn has even agreed to "adopt" the event as his own, meaning he will be the official organizer, defining the rules, helping to promote it, and streaming it like any of their other events.5 - Phase 2 - AFoG ExhibitionOnce Phase 0 is completed, I will coordinate with both Airn and the primary Starcraft enthusiasts in the BCH community to find a spot on the calendar sometime in Q4 2025 for a Starcraft 2 exhibition tournament.This event will be run entirely on AFoG using the funds from Phase 0. We will be coordinating with Airn to answer any questions and provide whatever help is required to get interested members of his community set up on AFoG and registered for the event. The prize pool will be funded by this campaign and any other sponsorships that materialize between now and then, and we will also be promoting it in the BCH gaming community.This exhibition represents an opportunity to demonstrate the capabilities of both AFoG and BCH to a group of people who have never seen them before as well as make some new Starcraft friends and watching some excellent SC2 play!6 - Phase 3 - Possible partnershipThere is a possibility (no guarantees of any kind by anyone) that this sponsorship and exhibition will be the beginning of a new partnership between Platinum Esports and the BCH community via AFoG. If their experience is a good one they might very well migrate their tournament activity for all their games entirely to AFoG. They would benefit from the sponsorships (plus there will be some leftover funds in the vault for additional events) and BCH enthusiasts are always happy for opportunities to tip some sats into the newly created wallet of someone who has never tried BCH before. Everybody wins!7 - Get InvolvedYou can participate in the ongoing conversation about this project in the BCH Gamers telegram channel here:t.me/BCHGamersIf you have a logo you want to slap onto the AFoG exhibition event(s), create a Sponsor on AFoG and then a Sponsorship for Power Overwhelming. Any funds you send to that sponsorship address will contribute directly to the guild's vault and your logo will appear on their events (more contribution = bigger logo)afifthofgaming.com/Sponsor/CreateIf you want to just drop a coin into the guilds vault anonymously, use this address. Any funds sent here will be counted as a donation from "The BCH Community" and used to fund the prize pools of their future events:bitcoincash:qpeea2k8udw2e5pzlejshqr5pk04zdnnlsfxte2gdp

title: Club Cup Bitcoin Cash 2025 La Habana-Cuba
description: 🚀 Club Cup BCH – Funding the First Week of Cuba’s Largest Bitcoin Cash Event! ⚽ We are launching our first FundMe Cash campaign to support the first week of Club Cup BCH 2025, Cuba’s biggest Bitcoin Cash-powered soccer tournament. 📆 What This Campaign CoversThis fundraiser will only finance the first week of the tournament: - June 7-8 – Round of 16: 16 teams compete in 8 exciting matches.After this stage, the tournament will continue June 14-15 with the Quarterfinals, followed by a break until June 28 or the Final Four phase.---🌍 Why This Matters – BCH Adoption & Past SuccessThe Club Cup BCH builds on the success of the Relámpago Cup BCH 2024, which introduced Bitcoin Cash to Cuban athletes and local vendors. The previous event proved that peer-to-peer money can empower communities, allowing players to experience BCH in a real-world setting.Bitcoin Cash & Financial Freedom in CubaCuba faces banking restrictions, currency instability, and limited access to global financial systems. Bitcoin Cash provides an alternative, a fast, decentralized, borderless payment solution that enables Cubans to transact freely.This tournament isn’t just about soccer, it’s a movement to expand BCH adoption in the Cuban community, offering young athletes firsthand experience using Bitcoin Cash for payments, savings, and local transactions.Our goal? Strengthen Bitcoin Cash adoption and build lasting financial independence in Cuba through sports! 🚀⚽🔥---🎁 Raffles & BCH Adoption InitiativeTo spread Bitcoin Cash in the Cuban community, we will run Instagram raffles during each match:✔ Fans who guess the correct score will enter a BCH prize draw! ✔ This helps introduce BCH to new users, growing real adoption. 💚 We aim to create up to 1,000 new Selene wallets during the tournament, helping more Cubans access peer-to-peer money.---🛒Bitcoin Cash Real-World ExperiencesThroughout the next tournament weekend, we will: ✔ Sell beverages using BCH to create practical payment experiences. ✔ Offer global lotto BCH entries, helping attendees use BCH for entertainment and transactions. These initiatives allow players, fans, and vendors to experience BCH in everyday situations, reinforcing its role as a real alternative to traditional financial systems.---🔗 Meet the Competing Teams Here are the 16 teams competing in Club Cup BCH: 1. @fc_realsanmiguel2. @cubayern_afc3. @cujae_fc4. Olimpiakos Habana 5. Betis Cuba 6. Santa Felicia FC 7. UD Marianao FR 8. Real Fortuna CF 9. Universidad del Deporte CF 10. FC Galaxy (Vigente campeón) 11. Cuba Chelsea 12. Querejeta FC 13. Atletico Cuevita 14. Peniel FC 15. Inter Varona 16. FC Boyeros ---🎯 Flipstarter Goal: 1.89 BCH (~$800)This campaign will only cover expenses for the Round of 16—a total of 8 matches during the first weekend of competition.💰 Budget Breakdown| Category | Round of 16 | Total BCH ||--------------------------|---------------------------|| Referees & Medical Staff | 0.50 | 0.50 || Logistics | 0.25 | 0.25 || Organizers | 0.25 | 0.25 || Field Maintenance | 0.25 | 0.25 || Marketing | 0.22 | 0.22 || Raffles & Prizes | 0.35 | 0.35 || Media Coverage | 0.45 | 0.35 ||Volunteers | 0.22 | 0.22 ||T-shirts | 0.40 | 0.40 || TOTAL COST | 2.89 BCH We have received a direct donation of 1 BCH, and we now need to raise 1.89 BCH to cover the remaining costs.------We invite Bitcoin Cash supporters, investors, and projects to support the Club Cup BCH first week and help showcase BCH adoption globally.💚 Every donor will be recognized on the final championship shirts worn by the winning team!---📡 Join Us & Make HistoryFollow the Club Cup BCH and be part of Cuba’s largest BCH-powered sports movement.📢 Instagram: @clubcupbch📢 Twitter: @Relampagocupbch📢 YouTubeLet's expand BCH adoption in Cuba through sports, technology, and community empowerment! 🚀⚽🔥 A huge thank you to Cash Stamps and Steve Thurmond for inspiring us to launch Club Cup BCH and for their invaluable support as our first sponsorYour motivation and guidance have been instrumental in shaping this initiative, and your suggestion to test FundMeCash has given us a powerful way to reach BCH supporters worldwide. We deeply appreciate your vision, encouragement, and belief in our project, helping us bring financial freedom through sports in Cuba!Thank you for making this possible

title: BCH Nigeria Q2 2025
description: 2024 was a transformative year for Bitcoin Cash adoption, particularly across the Global South.BitcoinCash Nigeria played a pivotal role, positioning Bitcoin Cash strategically within key ecosystems through numerous impactful initiatives. Our efforts focused on laying strong foundations, enhancing BCH representation within the crypto community, and pioneering strategies that attracted new users.In 2025, we are committed to intensifying these efforts—not only in Nigeria but across the Global South. Adoption remains a marathon, and our goal is to solidify Bitcoin Cash as the premier global peer-to-peer electronic cash solution.We aim to raise 25 BCH through this Fund Me campaign to fund strategic activities planned for Q2 2025. With community support, we will accelerate our mission, driving transformative change and significantly broadening the reach of Bitcoin Cash.BitcoinCash Nigeria: Key Activities in 2024Internships and Educational Initiatives:BitcoinCash Nigeria / Zapit Student Internship ProgramDetails 1 | Details 2Community Engagement and Webinars:BitcoinCash Virtual MeetupDetailsBCH HUB Partnership with Women Tech Makers (International Women's Day)DetailsBitcoinCash Webinar on CashTokensDetailsBCH4GOOD Humanitarian Outreach to HospitalsDetailsCashToken MeetupDetailsBitcoinCash Webinar: BCH BULLDetailsStrategic Workshops and Discussions:BCH HUB at Digital Ecosystem Country Assessment WorkshopDetailsAMA Session Zapit - P2P Exchange (Nigerian Payment Options)DetailsX Space Session: BitcoinCash in AfricaDetailsBitcoinPizza Day CelebrationDetailsFree Roger CampaignDetails 1 | Details 2Community and Sports Initiatives:BitcoinCash Community Football LeagueDetails 1 | Details 2Sponsoring WADAAC Community EngagementDetails 1 | Details 2X Space - BitcoinCash Nigeria & Zano CollaborationDetailsTech Festivals and Outreach:BCH HUB at Arewa Tech FestDetails 1 | Details 2BitcoinCash Giveaway (Bitcoin.com) – Over 5000 New WalletsDetails 1 | Details 2Hijacking Bitcoin Book GiveawayDetailsPolicy and Governance:BCH HUB: Policy Dialogue on Enhancing Nigeria Digital Innovation EcosystemDetailsBCH HUB at ISN Annual Gathering 2024DetailsBCH HUB at E-governance Bill Stakeholder Engagement AdamawaDetailsMajor Events and Milestones:BCH FESTIVAL Nigeria 2024Details 1 | Details 2BitcoinCash ATM Launch at BCH HUBPartnerships:BCH HUB Partners with the Federal Ministry of Communications, Innovation and Digital Economy, Nigeria (Mentor Hub for National Girls in ICT Competition)BCH HUB Partners with 3MTT (Applied Learning Cluster)🔥 Strategic Focus for Q2 2025: Scaling Adoption, Empowering Builders, and Boosting Real-World Usage1. BCH BUILD Hackathon: Unleashing Peer-to-Peer Innovation in Nigeria (July–August 2025)The BCH BUILD Hackathon will onboard new developers, empower innovation, and build the next generation of BCH-powered platforms in Nigeria and across Africa.Why This Matters:Accelerates the creation of real-world BCH applications.Onboards tech talent through immersive mentorship and collaboration.Encourages cross-functional teams to tackle local challenges with BCH.Highlights:$5,000 in BCH prizes for winning teams$50 participation bursary + BCH swag for all accepted participantsMentorship from ecosystem leadersKey themes: Financial Inclusion, Local Commerce, EdTech, Games, and Agriculture2. BitcoinCash Trade Fair: Driving Merchant Adoption (June 28–29, 2025)The BitcoinCash Trade Fair is a direct push for real-world commerce adoption—bridging crypto with local businesses.Key Features:Live BCH transaction demosBCH Swap Booth for instant fiat-to-BCH conversionMerchant booths using BCH POS systemsBusiness panels, games, prizes, and live engagement activitiesGoal: To equip merchants with the tools and knowledge to accept BCH and thrive in the digital economy.3. Community Engagement and Strategic PartnershipsWe will continue to deepen our grassroots presence, foster institutional collaboration, and showcase BCH at top tech and blockchain events.Upcoming Events (Q2 2025):Women Tech Makers Meetup – May ✅Google I/O with GDG Community – May ✅Arewa Tech Fest – May 20–22 ✅Stellar West Africa Conference – May ✅BitcoinPizza Day – May 22 ✅BCH4Good Outreach – June 20BCH MarketPlace - 28-29 june ISN Annual Summit 2025 – Date TBABCH Hangouts – April, June, JulyBCH Hackathon - july - AugustOpen Source Africa – August 14–16GITEX NIGERIA 2025 - September 1 - 4 Roadshow : june - july - August 🧭 Vision: Peer-to-Peer Money for the Global SouthBitcoinCash Nigeria remains committed to an Africa where individuals and communities are financially empowered by open, low-cost, peer-to-peer money.Our 2025 roadmap is bold—and achievable with your help.🎯 Fundraising Target: 25 BCHThis fund will directly power: ✅ Hackathon logistics, prizes, and developer incentives ✅ Merchant tools, POS materials, and event execution ✅ Outreach materials, travel, and speaker engagements ✅ Content production, education kits, and team stipends🚀 Let's build the future of money. Together.Every contribution brings us closer to a more open, inclusive digital economy. Support the campaign.

title: Audiobook Project: Hijacking Bitcoin by Roger Ver
description: 👋 Hello again!My name is Lucas. I focus my YouTube content on creating valuable material for everyday people.My goal is to bring important ideas closer to those who don't have a background in philosophy, economics, politics, or the scams that arise from the concentration of state violence in the hands of the same few.📺 Examples of what I do:🪙 Infinite issuance vs Fixed Supply: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zlyKroLdM0w🏦 Fractional Reserve Banking: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uNNDpZ4q9lg&t=10s💥 Why BTC failed: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C0wiBv6r-Vw🧠 I’m not here to compete with other crypto communities.My aim is to go back to basics and help promote the real use of BCH — especially among merchants.🎙️ Previous NarrationsTo help people access freedom-oriented philosophy, I’ve narrated several classic texts using natural voice and voice acting techniques:No Treason – Lysander Spooner: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s5nuQ_VUaWYThe Man vs The State – Herbert Spencer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hZPWQCCW8W0&t=5557sNew Libertarian Manifesto – Samuel Edward Konkin III: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PtF-CJ8fA_oThat Which is Seen and That Which is Not Seen – Frédéric Bastiat: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cfeajxw-SdIVices Are Not Crimes – Lysander Spooner: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Erh3LZgdLaw&t=1259sI, Pencil – Leonard Read: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Beg9Q3TDjg0📚 What’s the new project?I want to produce the audiobook version of Roger Ver’s book “Hijacking Bitcoin” 🗣️ In Spanish first, then English. 🎧 Narrated with human voice, clear tone, and edited for full listener engagement.This book explains how Bitcoin was hijacked by harmful interests. I want to bring that message to those who don’t have time to read but still want to understand why BTC is no longer the freedom tool it was meant to be.💻 What do I need?✅ A professional microphone Shure MV7 Podcast Mic: https://www.mercadolibre.com.ar/microfono-dinamico-shure-mv7-k-para-podcast-cardioide-color-negro/p/MLA16255476✅ A professional editor To help with the editing while I continue narrating and making BCH content. I can narrate max 2 hours a day — the rest of the work needs to keep moving.✅ A better laptop To improve my workflow and manage both narration and publishing with better performance.🕒 TimelineThe Spanish version of the audiobook will be ready within 40 days after funds are received. The English version will follow right after.🔗 Follow me or reach out:YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LecturasLibertariasTwitter / X: https://x.com/LucasDiDodo1Telegram: https://t.me/LucasDidodoFeel free to ask anything about the project or about me personally. Thanks in advance for your support! Lucas

We especially want to give a massive shoutout to Majamalu, @cashstamps, @TheBCHPodcast, Cash Dragon, and 98 for making this possible with their incredible contributions! title: Defi in Bitcoin Cash is the game changer!
description: HI, I am ThunderBCH an active BCH supporter and promoter. I have been around since 2020 and socially active since 2021. A lot of guys knows me from smartBCH days as I was really active since then. I have been using and promoting Cashtokens from day 1 and I think it's time to level up up the game!We all know BCH is one of a kind in the crypto is and that's why we all love it. We have seen BCH have great potential in defi from smartBCH but that ended tragically because of mismanagement and fraudulent of backup funds. Now we have Cashtokens directly integrate in the blockchain of BCH which makes it safe and immune to such disaster! Its fast, cheap, secure and most importantly decentralized! Even after having such wonderful features Cashtokens does not have much attention or should I say marketing? Marketing is essential for anything idea to succeed. It helps connect communities and get new users onboard. With the BCH bankrun narrative going on and seeing how effective it's been I think this is the perfect time to push Cashtokens narrative as well. Goals of this fundraiser :Promote Cashtokens.Having tutorials for each dapps which help explain newbies.Attract builders and users by raising awarenessHaving available social media usable graphics to be used anywhere, anytime.Here is what I promise to deliver : 30 high quality educational videos showing how to use and interact with Cashtokens ecosystem. 50 Profesional promotional marketing Videos. e.g : https://x.com/ThunderBCH/status/166066041626208256260 animated promotional useful gifs which can be used by community members. e.g : https://x.com/CheapLightning/status/1682597498639224832100 promotional banners with showcasing latest development's, recent updates, updates about old and new projects which will help people to keep track of Cashtokens ecosystem more conveniently. e.g : https://x.com/ThunderBCH/status/1936838743916454011Provide source-file of the work (Adobe Photoshop, Adobe After effects etc) which makes it easier for other community members can change the contents as they see fit.Is the funding fair?30 educational videos each takes around 2-3 hour editing time for script writing, collecting materiel's and editing as these videos are long. Which is about 90 hours.50 promotional videos each takes around 2 hours of editing time. Which is 100 hours.60 gifs each takes about 1-1.5 hours as they are hard to animate. Which is 90 hours.150 professional banners each takes about 1 hours to create. Which is 150 hours.The total comes to 430 hours. Which is about $13/hour. I promise to deliver these in around 6-7 months which is around 16 hours of work each week.Why fund this?Cashtokens potential is limitless but it's a bit stagnant because of no marketing. A lot of people struggles to interact with defi protocols as some has never interacted with defi before. These contents will help people to understand, make Cashtokens more visible in social media which will attract builders and new users. After the disaster with smartBCH the community have learnt the hard way and understands that decentralization is the way. With proper marketing Cashtokens can reach millions of users making defi boom in the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem.Why me?I have been around since first day of Cashtokens and have been making promotional contents about BCH for years. Some of my contents have been used for marketing ( https://t.me/rcashtokens/3427 ) and is still used by some community members as intro or outro of videos ( below content ). I have done this all for free up until now. So why the funding this time? I am a student studying abroad in university. I have shifted recently this year so I need to balance my education and contribution to financially support myself in a foreign country. I am confident the contents I create can help Cashtokens get more attention as my social media account has good reach. What if this is not fully funded?I will continue to do what I am already doing. Contribute as much as I can but at a slower pace as I will have to put my time and effort elsewhere to support my living expense in a foreign country. Your Contacts :thunderbch@gmail.comTwitter : ThunderBCHTelegram : ThunderBCHYour support means a lot, It is more than a donation, it shows support to my contribution and encourages for me to do much more! BCH is sound money for the world.

title: Club Cup BCH 2025 Final Four La Habana-Cuba
description: BCH Club Cup - Support the Semifinals and Grand Final in Cuba! 🚀Hello Bitcoin Cash community!We are excited to launch the funding campaign for the most thrilling phase of the BCH Club Cup: ¡Semifinals and the Grand Final! This tournament is not just about football; it's a vital engine for Bitcoin Cash adoption and financial empowerment in Cuba.Our Goal: 🎯We aim to raise 4.65 BCH to cover the essential costs and prizes that will make this final phase a memorable event and a catalyst for real BCH adoption in the community.Why Support the BCH Club Cup? 🌱We understand the desire to see tangible results from contributions, and we share that commitment. However, it is crucial to understand the unique context in which we operate:A Complex and Sensitive Environment: In Cuba, discussions about financial autonomy, Bitcoin, and freedom are viewed with caution and skepticism due to fear of persecution or retaliation. People often prefer to keep their identity private due to existing restrictions, which limits how we can share certain progress metrics publicly, unlike in other countries. This makes building trust a slower, more personal process. We are pioneers on this path, daring to step forward against these barriers and being the first group on the island to conduct transactions and public events with cryptocurrencies, while others operate from abroad.Long-Term Adoption and Breaking Barriers: Our project is only 8 months old. We are working with a community where many do not even know what a digital wallet or cryptocurrency is. The journey from initial awareness to active and consistent coin adoption is a marathon, not a sprint. Expecting massive adoption in 6 months is a very optimistic goal. We are breaking significant barriers, such as the need to access private networks (Mesh or VPN) to use app stores, which is an additional challenge for adoption.Building Foundational Awareness and Empowerment: Beyond wallet installations, we are seeing significant growth in awareness and interest. Our Instagram grows daily with new followers and genuine interactions from people who are just beginning to learn. These participation metrics are crucial for the education and awareness phase that precedes financial adoption. Furthermore, the MVP of each matchday has been given antenas for improving mobile network signals. With this, we not only provide tools that improve the quality of life for tournament participants, but also teach them to embrace ideas of freedom with BCH. Crucially, recent data from the main developer of Selene Wallet shows that Cuba is currently leading all countries in the number of Selene Wallet downloads over the last 60 days. You can see this verifiable proof directly in his post: https://x.com/kzKallisti/status/1939079171105308845Beyond The BCH Club Cup : It is not just a tournament, it's a movement! Our event is a vehicle for initial engagement, education, and trust-building. The real work is in follow-up, continuous education, and fostering an environment where people feel safe and empowered to explore BCH for daily use. Our event is public and open, acting as a 'Trojan horse' to introduce ideas of freedom in a complex and hostile context. We recognize that there are aspects for which our community is not yet ready, but we continue to advance step by step.There is some stats of our Instagram account (https://www.instagram.com/clubcupbch/) that show the recent engagement of the Cuban community in the las 30 days:Your support not only funds a tournament; it invests in education, infrastructure, and building a community that embraces financial freedom through Bitcoin Cash in a place where it is most needed.Key Tournament Dates: 🗓️Semifinals: July 5th at Universidad Fajardo.Teams Qualified:Atletico CuevitaFC Galaxy (Previous Champion)Querejeta FCSanta Felicia FC Grand Final: July 12th at Universidad Fajardo.Our Track Record and Commitment in the Cuban Community: 🏅We have demonstrated our presence and capability through previous successful campaigns and the organization of the Copa Relámpago 2024, the first edition of this tournament. This validates our commitment and the trust we have built in the Cuban community. In the first tournament, we had 8 teams participating, and in this edition, we have managed to involve 16 teams from Havana, demonstrating tangible growth in our reach and in the more than 500 people directly involved. We invite you to relive the excitement of our previous final:Previous BCH Relampago CUP Final Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JzHnPhPoYNoFunding Details: 💰Here's how your contributions will be used (considering 1 BCH ≈ $490 USD):Semifinals and Final Recording & Broadcast:Estimated Cost: 0.65 BCH Will ensure the excitement of the key matches and the tournament's culmination are captured and widely shared, showcasing BCH in action. This includes a Director, Vmix operator, 2 cameras, 1 narrator, 2 laptops, a capture card, and a microphone.We hope to record semifinals and upload full matches.For the final there is a BIG surprise, we will live broadcast the final from our youtube channel. Club Cup BCH youtube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RelampagoCupBCHUniforms for 4 Teams (15 players each):Estimated Cost: 1.11 BCHWill provide a professional identity to the teams and foster a sense of belonging. Each uniform will include the team logo, BCH logo, CashStamps logo (as sponsor), Selene Wallet logo, and a 'FreeRoger' message on the back, acknowledging support for Roger Ver as an iconic Bitcoin Cash figure globally who is currently facing political retaliation after published Hijacking Bitcoin book. This message has been used in our previous tournament without issues, demonstrating its acceptance in the local community. Santa Felicia FC (Yellow), Querejeta FC (Gray), Galaxy FC (White) and Atletico Cuevita (Blue).Organizers (Semifinals and Final):Estimated Cost: 0.65 BCHThis budget covers the essential human capital for general coordination and detailed event management. It includes constant communication with suppliers (uniforms, recording, trophies), supervision of support staff, management of event flow on match days, resolution of unforeseen issues, and ensuring both sporting aspects and BCH adoption activities run smoothly. Their work is crucial for the integral operation of the tournament.Referees and Medical Staff (Semifinals and Final):Estimated Cost: 0.35 BCHEnsures fair and safe development of the 3 key matches (2 semifinals and the final).Logistics (Semifinals and Final):Estimated Cost: 0.22 BCHThis fund is allocated to the operation of implicit details of the sporting event. It covers equipment transport (balls, first-aid supplies, sound equipment, etc.), adequate hydration for players and staff during the final stage of competition, and other small operational expenses that ensure smooth functioning on the field.Field Rental (Universidad del deporte Manuel Fajardo):Estimated Cost: 0.22 BCHSecures an appropriate venue for the tournament.Trophy:Estimated Cost: 0.10 BCH A symbol of victory and the champion team's effort.Raffles (Semifinals and Final):Estimated Cost: 0.20 BCH Will encourage audience participation and engagement during the events, currently there are two prediction raffles live on our Instagram page.Tournament Prizes:Champion Prize: 0.5 BCHRecognizes the winning team's effort and dedication.Runner-up Prize: 0.2 BCHMotivates teams to fight until the end.Top Scorer Prize: 0.15 BCHIncentivizes individual excellence and competitive spirit.Tournament MVP Prize: 0.15 BCH Rewards the most valuable player for their impact on the game.Mesh Antenna for Tournament MVP:Estimated Cost: 0.15 BCH A tangible tool that improves connectivity and quality of life, aligned with the spirit of BCH freedom.Total Estimated Campaign: 4.65 BCHFrequently Asked Questions (FAQ):What's the point of giving BCH as prizes if participants have nowhere to spend it in Cuba?For many, receiving BCH is their first real interaction with a cryptocurrency and a digital wallet. This breaks initial barriers and is a fundamental educational tool. In an environment with banking restrictions, BCH offers stable value for saving and enables P2P transactions. Furthermore, at the BCH Club Cup events themselves, we encourage its use by selling refreshments/snacks and offering raffle entries with BCH, creating micro-economies. Ultimately, it's an investment in digital financial literacy and building a user base that will drive future adoption and the creation of more spending points.How is transparency in the use of donated funds guaranteed?We are committed to maximum transparency. Our campaign is phased, meaning we commit to delivering results and reporting on fund usage after each tournament stage. We will provide regular updates through our social media channels (Instagram, YouTube, Twitter) with photos and videos..What is the long-term vision for BCH adoption in Cuba beyond this tournament?The BCH Club Cup is an initial catalyst. Our long-term vision is to foster a self-sustaining community of BCH users in Cuba, where people not only receive but also use and understand the value of Bitcoin Cash for their daily transactions and savings. We aim to inspire local entrepreneurs to accept BCH and users to demand it, building an adoption infrastructure from the ground up.How can I verify the real impact of my donation?We invite you to follow us on our social media (links below) where we actively share progress, photos and videos of events, participant testimonials, and updates on how BCH is directly impacting the community. The growth of our Instagram audience with people new to crypto is a key indicator of expanding awareness and the increase of BCH wallets usage confirms it.Is it safe for participants to receive and use cryptocurrencies in Cuba?We operate with caution and respect for the local context. Education on wallet privacy and security is a fundamental part of our program. By using non-custodial wallets and focusing on P2P transactions and limited uses within a controlled environment, we minimize risks and empower users with knowledge.How will you address the dependence on external funds for future phases or projects?We recognize that long-term sustainability is key. At this initial stage, external funding is vital to lay the groundwork for BCH adoption in such a challenging environment. We are focused on building a solid and educated user base and demostrating the real value of BCH through events like this. As the Cuban BCH community grows and matures, we will actively explore sustainability models that may include:Local sponsorships: Seeking support from businesses and entrepreneurs within Cuba who begin to see the value of BCH adoption.Sustainable micro-economies: Encouraging the use of BCH in daily transactions and small community initiatives that can generate revenue for the project.Self-sustaining education programs: Developing workshops or resources that, over time, can fund themselves or with local support.Our goal is for each FundMe campaign to bring us closer to a point where the local community can drive much of the adoption and funding autonomously. We hope that by 2026, the BCH Club Cup will be a reference in the Cuban community and we can self-manage most of our expenses with local investors and collaborators.Special Thanks and Our Commitment: 🙏We want to express our deepest gratitude to the collaborators and founders of our previous campaigns who have made it possible to reach this stage of the BCH Club Cup. Without the unwavering support of:Steve ThurmondCashStampsMolecularMajamaluThe BCH PodcastCash Dragon98And all Anonymous DonationsWe are committed to phased management, meaning we focus on delivering tangible and transparent results in each stage of the tournament. This approach allows us to be accountable and demonstrate the direct impact of your contributions in the Cuban community.Transparency and Updates: 📈We are committed to transparency. We will provide regular updates on campaign progress and fund usage through our platforms:YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RelampagoCupBCHInstagram: @clubcupbchTwitter: @RelampagocupBCHJoin Us!Your support is fundamental to the success of the BCH Club Cup and to bringing financial freedom to Cuba. Help us make history, one goal and one BCH transaction at a time!Thank you for your trust and for being part of this mission.

title: FREE BCH TATTOO NFT INITIATIVE
description: The 00TATT$ Experience x Bitcoin Cash 00TATT$ is going to bring a fresh approach to onboarding new users to Bitcoin Cash via the unique innovative method of free tattoo distribution. Website: tatts.cash (PROMO VIDEO ON WEBSITE IS A MUST SEE!)Funding Requested : 8.5 BCH (~$500 per BCH)This Flipstarter will fund: 1 month of tattoo studio time (labor, rent & equipment / supplies) 5x BCH-funded tattoos (free for recipients), plus $2 CashStamp for onboarding Photos & social media of these tattoos Each tattoo recipient will be onboarded to Selene Wallet, receive their custom tattoo NFT, a free CashStamp & onboarding to BCH, plus referral to BCH educational resources as necessary. Further free tattoos can be funded separately by the BCH community through website donations ($150 / tattoo). Free tattoos have been proven to receive strong engagement in the Las Vegas area. The idea is to seed a small community of passionate BCH adopters & advocates with this onboarding, which can later be monetized via other means – meetups, BCH merchandise & so forth. This initial funding also covers some startup equipment and supplies that will NOT need to be covered by future FundMe campaigns. Business Proposal After a super successful connection from the mega creative Influencer Kenn Bosak to BCH Enthusiast Steve Thurmond, the Bitcoin Cash movement has been adopted by the branding impact of The 00TATT$ Experience. This complex yet organic union has manifested the most revolutionary grassroots marketing strategy designed to increase Bitcoin Cash (BCH) adoption and engagement. Through the power of free, highly customizable BCH-related tattoos, each participant becomes not only a user, but a living ambassador of the brand. The Certificates of Authenticity for these tattoos are also minted as NFTs — exclusively purchasable with Bitcoin Cash — creating a viral feedback loop of exposure, ownership, and utility that even highway billboards can’t compete with. ✅ Call to Action Let’s turn people into platforms. Partner with The 00TATT$ Experience and help grow Bitcoin Cash like never before — through ink, blockchain, and pure relentless creative energy. This systematic marketing strategy is a beast of a machine with the track record creating an astronomical trajectory! But like any well-designed machine, consistent maintenance is a necessity. This is the machine that is the catalyst to send BCH to the moon! 00TATT$ is a metaphorical astronaut and The 00TATT$ Experience can be your personal spaceship launching from the most strategic on location on the planet! There are currently 6 Bitcoin Ben’s Crypto Clubs in America, and 00TATT$ is stationed at the newest one opening in one of the fastest growing cities in the world! Under the creative management of Kenn Bosak, this Crypto Club in the Art District of Las Vegas will be the epicenter for cryptocurrency educational entertainment! We have the opportunity to be the first club offering free BCH Tattoos, BCH Cashstamps, and BCH Information to skyrocket BCH Adoption! There is no place on the planet with a more strategic launch point, but all these advantages still require a NASA level team of support to reach the moon. We just managed to break the atmosphere with the completion of 20 minted BCH Tattoo NFTs in less than 7 days of effort! Creating 20 walking talking permanent BCH billboards equaling thousands and gradually millions of marketing dollars. For a tiny percentage of that number on a consistent basis, the true supporters of BCH will get personal access and tremendous influence on this machine that produces the strongest level of marketing on the planet! If we had these Cash Stamps at the time, that would have also been 20 new BCH Selene Wallet carriers with a new BCH tattoo and enough information and emotional attachment to the newly minted NFT of their tattoo that they could’ve use BCH on the spot to invest in its royalties. This marketing strategy creates a never-ending snowball effect that will produce measurable growth in direct correlation with the number of tattoos completed. To show proof of work as well as our personal investment to the growth of BCH, this 1st 20 BCH Tattoo NFTs were produced at a much-discounted rate to our generous support from Steve Thurmond. A man that doesn’t even have a single tattoo, invested in the production of these 20 BCH Tattoo NFTs single-handedly because he’s wise enough to see the marketing value we provide to BCH together. What started out as a simple sponsorship investment, has evolved into a dynamic marketing tool that calls for a team of true supporters. Steve is a true supporter, and he’s vowed to contribute this same investment on a consistent basis, but he vividly expressed to me that we must be aware of campaign fatigue. I’ve also heard elsewhere that my best hope is to pray for a whale to like this campaign so much I won’t need other supporters. I’ve recently seen a campaign requesting whales to keep their investments to a minimum to establish a more community aspect in their campaign. I see the value in all these approaches to being a valuable member of the BCH community. This campaign’s success will single-handedly create a community of BCH Enthusiasts with real life interactions and social gatherings with the tattoos, NFTs, and BCH to show. This initial campaign is meant to be introducing this entirely new system of niche marketing with unfathomable potential for perpetual movement and growth. Objective To significantly raise awareness, user adoption, and transactional utility of Bitcoin Cash by offering a one-of-a-kind, interactive, real-world campaign that turns people into excited, permanent brand representatives — on skin, on social media, and on the blockchain. Core Strategy Free Bitcoin Cash Tattoos BCH Tattoos are given away daily from The 00TATT$ Experience’s Traveling Pop-Up Tattoo Shop currently stationed at, but not limited to, Bitcoin Ben’s Crypto Club in Las Vegas or by delivery in a Tattoo Party Bus. Participants choose from a library of custom Bitcoin Cash-themed designs or create their own. Examples include: “Bad Bitches Only,” “Believe,” “Biggest Boss,” “I ♥ Booty,” and more with the “B” being the Green BCH Brand/Logo. Social Media Bitcoin Cash Educational Content Every tattoo session will be educating clients about BCH as well as professionally video recorded and edited for later social media output. Posted across TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, and YouTube spreading the BCH message and information. Tattoo NFT Minting Every BCH tattoo’s Certificate of Authenticity is minted into a unique NFT, only purchasable with Bitcoin Cash. Potential idea for follow up: Royalties for Tattoo Designs Anyone who owns an original/custom BCH Tattoo NFT earns a percentage of compensation or a flat rate every time their custom design is selected for another tattoo. Anyone can submit ideas to be created as tattoos and receive royalties/compensation each time their design is selected by customers. If you’re an artist or have some good BCH Tattoo ideas, submit them to be added to the 00TATT$ growing collection of BCH template and custom Tattoo artwork. Your personal BCH Wallet QR code will be permanently affixed to your custom BCH Tattoo artwork and every time it’s selected/inked, you’ll receive royalties. Equipment & Operational Costs (Supplied by or available at no cost to 00TATT$) Professional tattoo setup Tattoo Party Bus Gas and Maintenance Video gear (4K camera, lighting, editing software) NFT minting integration/hosting Additional Marketing Value***The 00TATT$ Experience collects contact information from every participant, including email addresses. This creates a growing email list that is highly valuable for: Future Bitcoin Cash campaigns Exclusive NFT drop alerts Community building and event invites Long-term marketing outreach How You Can Support If you believe in Bitcoin Cash and want to see more people learning about it, I invite you to: 💚 Contribute to this campaign (every BCH counts!) 🔄 Share this campaign with others who support BCH education 💚Donate to fund further free tattoos: bitcoincash:qq9l56tkuzh7r4yy8ym3vqrq30pcjq73kuf7axrgn4📢 Engage with and promote BCH content to spread awareness Exclusive Perks for Contributors (Optional). As a supporter, you’ll receive: ⭐ Mentions at the end of my videos and social media posts 🔗 Direct links to your website, brand, or project 📢 Custom content to help promote your work Join the Movement – Let’s Build the BCH Future Together! Cost Breakdown for the Initial deliverables (~$500 per BCH) 2 BCH = $1000 for 1 Month Rent at Bitcoin Ben's Crypto Currency 2 BCH = $1000 Labor cost for 15 Years Experienced Professional Tattoo Artist Average yearly income for 15 year Professional Tattoo Artist > $100,000 3 BCH = $1500 For Reusable & Non-Reusable Tattoo Supplies, Upgrade & Restock: Needles Paper Towels Sanitary Chemicals Printer Ink, Copy Paper, Card Stock Paper and Laminating Paper High Quality Tattoo Machine (apx. $700-$1000) Tattoo Ink Copy Printer Stencil Printer 1.5 BCH = $750 for 5 Free Tattoos for willing recipients ($150 / tattoo)= 8.5 BCH ($4 250) To the BCH Community and Supporters I come before you humbly and boldly with intentions to express the extreme value that you're receiving from the 00TATT$ Free BCH TATTOO agenda. When contributing to the next free bch tattoo, it needs to be understood that you're investing in much more than a free tattoo on some stranger. So much more than a walking talking permanent billboard/BCH user/branding ambassador. These people receiving these tattoos literally have skin in the game before they have skin in the game! Giving each permanent billboard the potential to become full blown BCH enthusiasts! With Bitcoin Ben's Crypto Club reach and 00TATT$ being the organizer and educator of them within a community they helped create, the writing is on the wall for those with eyes to see. Even though these permanent billboards are invaluable within themselves, that's not where the true value of The 00TATT$ Agenda is. The true value you're investing in is a direct link to fix the diversity issue in the whole crypto community! You're investing in the route to tap into the number one spending and marketing culture in the world, the black community! Until now, there has been no entity designed specifically for the awareness and adoption of crypto in the black community. If there has been one, it failed miserably because I first bought bitcoin back in 2019, and there was no entity there to inform me (one of the leading minds of the black community) not to use my digital gold to purchase food to sell for dollars! To fix that obvious issue, The 00TATT$ Experience effortlessly puts itself into position to facilitate the mass adoption of crypto currency in the black community. Being able to authentically tap into the deepest and most needing part of the black community, with more urban movements like "BCH Mob" or "Bitcoin Cash Gang", together we will open up the flood gates of information and power to the number one spending culture in the world. The Urban/Hip Hop/Gangster/Black community is primed and ready to lead the world in crypto currency spending but they need to know what crypto is first! The Bitcoin Cash Community has the rare opportunity to be first Crypto Currency of the black community, quite literally. Bitcoin Cash inside Selene Wallets can be the next fried chicken, watermelon, Kool-Aid, Gucci belt! All jokes aside. I hope you all see the reach we truly have the potential to have. Together we can make this a reality. I'm willing to do whatever it takes to earn your trust, I just need my supporters to truly understand and appreciate the value I'm providing to not just the BCH community but to the entire Crypto world! Prepared By: The 00TATT$ Experience In Collaboration with Kenn Bosak and Steve Thurmond Special Thanks to Jeremy and Kallisti 📍Bitcoin Ben’s Crypto Club Las Vegas, NV 📧 tattupacinkur@gmail.com Through the power of free, highly customizable BCH-related tattoos, we're not only creating BCH users, but lifelong ambassadors! The tattoos are minted as NFTs purchasable with BCH! Here's a few LOW-RES images that were required for the NFTs' Thumbnails...see the actual NFTs on my website!

title: Chapa BCH Mozambique
description: A Real, Transparent, and Local Initiative I’m the founder of "Chapa BCH", a 100% transparent initiative to bring Bitcoin Cash (BCH) to the streets of Maputo and Matola - using low-cylinder cars and txopelas (our local word for tuk-tuks). This project is more than a fundraiser. It’s a sustainable and trackable business, built to employ locals, accept crypto as payment (BTC, USDT, etc.), convert everything into BCH, and pay drivers directly in Bitcoin Cash - giving them the freedom to hold or convert it into Mozambican Metical. Most people in Mozambique don’t use crypto yet. So we’ll also accept M-Pesa, Emola, and Mkesh (popular mobile money platforms) and convert those payments to BCH behind the scenes. To ensure a successful and transparent rollout of Chapa BCH, we’ll initially integrate with the Yango ride-hailing platform, which is already active in Mozambique. Yango will help us monitor driver routes, service quality, and performance - but the payments will still be made directly to us, outside of their platform. That means passengers can pay using crypto, or even local mobile money and all will be converted into Bitcoin Cash. This setup gives us the best of both worlds: logistics support from a proven platform, and financial independence through peer-to-peer crypto payments. Over time, we’ll migrate to our own BCH-based ride app, developed with the help of community developers - bringing everything in-house and crypto-native. With this system, we aim to: Employ Mozambican drivers and onboard them into crypto Create a local circular economy using Bitcoin Cash Educate the public on peer-to-peer money and financial sovereignty Make BCH visible and practical in daily life How It Works We'll use low-cylinder cars (affordable and fuel-efficient) We'll purchase a new txopela and wrap them with BCH branding We'll accept BTC, USDT, TRX, ETH, and other major cryptos then convert all in BCH Also accept M-Pesa, Emola, Mkesh (mobile money) and swap into BCH Use Paytaca POS and Bitcoin.com Wallet for seamless crypto payments Drivers are paid in BCH or Metical, depending on their preference We welcome donations of BCH stickers, wraps, flyers, t-shirts, etc. With support from devs, we aim to build a local BCH app to: Accept BCH payments from riders Pay salaries to drivers Show real-time balances and exchange rates 1. See It Before It Rolls: Designs, Dealers & Decisions Budget with Real Costs (Target: $7,500 – $8,000 in BCH) (Current exchange rates: 1 USD ≈ 68 MZN | 1 BCH ≈ $500) Item Description - Cost (USD) Low-cylinder car (used) 250,000 MZN $3,680 New Txopela (store price) 220,000 MZN $3,235 BCH vehicle wraps & shirts Custom or donated $200 POS/smartphones For Paytaca/BCH wallets $200 Driver training & onboarding Print + in-person guidance $150 Initial fuel, licensing, maintenance For 1 month operation $300 Print & social media marketing Flyers, QR stickers, etc. $100 Total Minimum startup goal $8,365 USD (17 BCH) Why You Can Trust This Project ✅ Led by a Bitcoin Cash advocate and educator in Mozambique for more than 6 years, verifiable proof on socials, blogs and more ✅ Fully transparent – all funding and results will be shared publicly ✅ Visible, real-world results – wrapped vehicles, BCH QR codes, real adoption ✅ Regular updates via blogs, X, Telegram, and videos ✅ Open to community input – we accept materials, ideas, and dev help How You Can Help Donate in BCH to this fundme.cash campaign Help develop or customize an app for Mozambique Ship BCH-branded materials: stickers, cards, shirts, wraps [those guys from cashstamps are doing a marvelous job and we could be onboarding people direct on the rides with them downloading Selene wallet, phenomenal!!] Share this project across BCH and crypto communities Next Steps (Future Growth) Add more vehicles as we scale Launch "Ride and Earn" incentives with BCH tokens, the money wizard gang!! Offer crypto cashback or discounts for BCH payments Monthly onboarding events Launch educational content: BCH basics, wallet use, and crypto safety Want to donate directly? You can use this QR and address below. bitcoincash:qq7wlpx8ghm0t22ulucnqc2gf9tjd4vaxy39jyye94 ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) 1. Who is behind this project? My name is Alberdioni8406 and I’ve been part of the Bitcoin Cash (BCH) community for over 6 years. I’m active BCH Creator on platforms like read.cash, Publish0x, Reddit, X, and others — always promoting BCH usage globally, especially in Mozambique. I also lead a local BCH-curious community and create content to onboard new users. 2. How will the funds be managed? The funds will be used according to real needs on the ground. Since we can’t yet buy vehicles directly with BCH, funds will be transparently swapped into Mozambican Metical (MZN) to make necessary purchases. One BCH wallet will be used for donation collection and spending tracking A separate wallet will hold the business BCH reserves We aim for sustainability, so all revenue from rides will be reconverted to BCH, with a portion kept in MZN for ongoing expenses. 3. Who will drive the vehicles? Will they be crypto-literate? We plan to onboard new drivers who currently have no experience with crypto. They will receive full training on using BCH wallets, Paytaca POS, and how crypto works. These drivers will become the first crypto-enabled service workers in the country, blazing the trail for broader adoption. 4. Will drivers be paid in BCH or Metical? Ideally, drivers will be paid in BCH. However, considering the current ecosystem, they’ll be able to choose between BCH and MZN based on their needs. The goal is to encourage full BCH wages over time as local adoption improves. 5. How will you convert other crypto and mobile money to BCH? Initially, we’ll use the Bitcoin.com Wallet with SideShift.ai integration to swap assets like BTC, USDT, or TRX into BCH — all without KYC, quickly and reliably. We’ll also accept M-Pesa, Emola, and Mkesh mobile money and convert the proceeds into BCH manually as needed. 6. What if the campaign doesn't reach its full goal? Fundme.cash only releases funds if the campaign is fully funded. If we fall short, we’ll encourage direct donations to the project address. That way, we may still launch a scaled-down version using only one vehicle. 7. How will you maintain and fuel the vehicles long-term? Rides will generate income, and a reserve vault will be created to fund repairs, fuel, and licenses. While we hope for minimal disruptions, the business will run sustainably with careful budgeting and a focus on growth. Emergencies will be handled case-by-case, and we’ll keep supporters informed. 8. Will supporters be able to track progress? Yes! I will post frequent updates on social media, blogs, and Telegram. Photos, videos, and spending reports will be shared to keep the community in the loop. 9. What’s the long-term vision for Rides BCH Mozambique? We’re planning to start in Maputo and Matola, with two vehicles: A car to connect both cities A txopela to cover more interior routes Long-term, we hope to expand to other provinces and rural areas, bringing BCH into places where traditional finance is limited. 10. Can international supporters help beyond donating BCH? Absolutely! You can contribute in many ways: Send Bitcoin Cash wraps, stickers, flyers, t-shirts Help us develop a localized app Offer guidance or resources to help improve visibility, UX, or operations Everyone in the global BCH community gains if this becomes a model for real adoption. 11. What about price volatility in BCH? As long as BCH continues to appreciate and beat inflation, we’ll be able to handle price fluctuations. Careful treasury management will help us maintain operations regardless of short-term dips. Why It’s Called “CHAPA BCH” In Mozambique, “chapa” is the everyday word for shared transport vehicles - the minivans, cars, or txopelas (tuk-tuks) that move people across cities like Maputo and Matola. “Taking a chapa” is more than just transport - it’s part of our daily rhythm, our economy, and our reality. That’s why this project is called CHAPA BCH: A true fusion of local life with global peer-to-peer money. It’s where Mozambique’s streets meet Bitcoin Cash - offering real transport services, real adoption, and real opportunities to pay, earn, and learn through crypto. Whether you’re riding in one or helping build it - CHAPA BCH is how we move forward. Ready to Roll This is how we bring Bitcoin Cash to life - by making it move people. Let’s stop imagining crypto adoption and start driving it - through the streets, through people’s phones, and through real economic activity. With your help, we’ll put BCH on the road - and make it part of daily life in Mozambique. ➡️ Donate now. Share the campaign. Join the ride.

title: Bitcoin Cash @ Nigeria Stablecoin Summit 🇳🇬
description: 📍 Why This Event MattersThe Nigeria Stablecoin Summit, hosted by the Africa Stablecoin Network, is officially the 🌍 largest stablecoin-focused conference in the world — and it’s happening right here in Nigeria!With: 👥 1,300+ participants 🏢 150+ companies represented 🎤 20+ powerful speakers 🚀 20+ startups showcasing innovation 🏆 5 finalists in a live pitch competition 📝 Essay competition for African youthThis is the first conference on the continent dedicated to Stablecoins & Real-World Assets (RWAs) — and it will shape the direction of Africa’s financial future.There’s never been anything like it — and Bitcoin Cash must be present.💚 Why Bitcoin Cash Must Be ThereBitcoin Cash (BCH) has been delivering real-world adoption in Africa since 2018 — powering local payments, remittances, education, and digital commerce. But there's more to BCH than P2P cash...The ecosystem is now home to cutting-edge stablecoin projects that bring decentralized finance to real people:🪙 Moria Money – A Bitcoin Cash–backed stablecoin built for global value storage ;moria.money/ 🦜 Parirty USD – A permissionless BCH-collateralized stablecoin: parityusd.com ]And here’s the highlight: 👉 Not only are we attending — I’ve been invited as a speaker at the summit.This is a powerful opportunity to:🎤 Speak on stage about Bitcoin Cash’s impact in Africa🌍 Showcase BCH-backed stablecoins to a high-level audience💡 Educate attendees about noncustodial money and economic freedom💸 Distribute MUSD paper wallets for live demos🤝 Connect with builders, regulators, and investors📷 Capture all the action to inspire global BCH supporters🧳 What We’re Raising ForWe’re seeking to raise 4 BCH (≈ $2,000) to make this mission impactful and visible.Here’s the breakdown of how funds will be used:💼 Budget Breakdown:✈️ Travel and Accommodation — $1,000 Covers round-trip flights from Yola to Lagos and hotel stay during the summit.💸 BCH Cashstamps & MUSD Giveaways — $500 Funds will be used to pre-load paper wallets with MUSD and BCH for attendees to try out BCH-backed stablecoins in real time.🧢 Swag & Promotional Materials — $500 Includes BCH-branded shirts, stickers, flyers, printed materials, and media production (photography, short video reels, livestreams).This budget ensures that we don’t just show up — we stand out, onboard users, and leave a lasting impression of Bitcoin Cash at the world’s biggest stablecoin summit.🌍 Why This Moment MattersAfrica is leading the global stablecoin conversation, and the world is paying attention. Bitcoin Cash must be in the room — not just represented, but leading.This isn’t just about showing up. It’s about visibility. Credibility. Presence. It’s about putting Bitcoin Cash back in the global spotlight — where it belongs.🔥 As a speaker at the world’s largest stablecoin summit, I carry the voice of the BCH community and the mission of peer-to-peer electronic cash for all.Let’s show the world what Bitcoin Cash is really about.🙌 Donate & ShareHelp us raise 4 BCH to fund this milestone opportunity for BCH in Africa.✅ Every satoshi counts ✅ Every donor fuels adoption ✅ Every share spreads the mission

title: The Bitcoin Cash Podcast: Episodes 156 - 165
description: FundMe: Episodes 156 - 165 of The Bitcoin Cash Podcast Funding requested: 17 BCH (~$520 / BCH) Deliverable - Episodes 156 - 165. The same show you already know and (hopefully) love. Notes FundMe The BCH Podcast is going from strength to strength. Ongoing community support via FundMe, donations & Patreon plus fresh work to build up a base of sponsors for the show is creating room for the Podcast to expand and improve its stream quality constantly. Less time needs to be spent on debunking lies on Twitter & more time is going into building a BCH ecosystem that attracts attention as a byproduct of its innovative & undeniable industry leadership. Visibility Podcast visibility is continuing to improve. Just about to hit 3 000 Youtube subscribers and 10 000 Twitter followers. It's very obvious that the BCH narrative in the broader "crypto" ecosystem has become unchallenged and rather unchallengeable since the ability to attack it with disinformation has so greatly decreased. Although not yet widely recognised for leading the industry, that will come as social resistance to BCH melts away in the face of growing business opportunities. The Podcast will remain a pillar of these efforts to improve BCH visibility & commercial success. Note to the community 2025 has been a really good year so far. I'm already looking forward to the Christmas episode recap, but we've still got 6 months to really seize the initiative and BCH to become known as a rising industry star. It all comes from everyone working as hard as they do every day and I'm so glad to be a part of it.Let's keep building Bitcoin Cash. Proof of Work I have aggregated previous delivery & community work (including previous 3x FundMes + 5x Flipstarter delivery & accountability) on a dedicated page on the Bitcoin Cash Podcast website. See it here: bitcoincashpodcast.com/proof-of-work. Cost breakdown: - 0.5 BCH topic research, episode hosting - 0.5 BCH production & editing costs - 0.1 BCH Thumbnail graphics & episode distribution- 0.1 BCH Timestamps, links & episode summary - 0.1 BCH Youtube Shorts creation & distribution- 0.1 BCH Instagram & TikTok videos & management1.4 BCH / episode x10 episodes = 14 BCH 0.5 BCH: BADGER burn. 1 BCH: Accounting costs. 1.4 BCH misc expenses: Ongoing costs such as website hosting & domain registration, Zoom subscription, supporting other community fundraisers, FAQ maintenance etc. 0.1 BCH: Fundme.cash fee Contributor rewards: Donations of > 0.5 BCH will receive a shoutout at the end of each show (like the Patrons and Sponsors) unless your name/message is rude or slanderous or you ask me not to or it's otherwise unreadable for some reason. Badgers.cash Badgers has been a strong success, recently peaking over 300 BCH TVL, with very minimal marketing & ongoing tech support. I really enjoy contributing to it with the Podcast FundMe raises as Proof of Community good will & I am still trying to encourage other ecosystem players to consider doing this too.-- Explanation of Badgers belowI discovered that BADGER token, obtainable only by provably time-locking BCH on-chain, has traded as high as #10 on Cauldron. Speculative liquidity thus created a **native BCH yield** for time-locking BCH. This is an incredible community innovation, as it allows anyone to yield on their BCH by provably HODLing (boosting price, liquidity & thus marketing reach) and it also allows anyone to generate goodwill in the community by provably purchasing & burning BADGER. It's always been possible to "donate" to all BCH holders by burning BCH itself, but that's psychologically unappealing due to the limited supply of BCH. BADGER avoids that, is fun, generates more transactions & usage of CashTokens tech.In order to boost Badger TVL, what is needed is some kind of non-speculative demand to buy (& ideally burn) BADGER tokens. My idea for this is that community projects can show goodwill to the community by provably burning & I'm going to start with the Podcast. As a part of this ongoing experiment, some of the desired raised funds will be used to purchase Badger on Cauldron.quest and provably burn it. Readers are more than welcome to frontrun this by purchasing BADGER, which achieves somewhat the same effect! If this caught on as a community initiative by aligned projects, it would encourage more people to lock BCH, boosting the price and bringing more resources to the community to run even more projects (which can burn more BADGER). Raising BCH on-chain TVL is one of the few ways to defeat naked short selling, Tether inflation or other manipulation of the BCH price so I am very interested in new & potentially compelling ways to encourage this. Disclaimer I will be completing the deliverables whether or not the FundMe gets funded, the continuation of the show & my assistance to the community is in no way contingent on this funding request. However, as per previous FundMe, I believe this is a valuable community service & get a lot of feedback in that regard. The community contributions do a lot to help the show operate in the community's best interest without compromising for financial necessity. ContactAs always, for any questions, comments or suggestions I can be reached at jeremy@bitcoincashpodcast.com, on Twitter at x.com/TheBCHPodcast or on Telegram t.me/BitcoinCashPodcast.

title: Stickers.Cash -DONATE TODAY!-
description: Stickers.cash – Spreading Bitcoin Cash, One Sticker at a TimePromoting Global Bitcoin Cash Adoption Through Merchant Visibility and Preloaded Paper Wallet RewardsIntroductionBitcoin Cash (BCH) is peer-to-peer electronic cash — but to fulfill its potential, it must be seen, understood, and used in the real world. While blockchain innovation is important, real adoption happens on the street — in small shops, markets, and businesses where people exchange value daily.That’s why we created Stickers.cash — a platform dedicated to spreading awareness and adoption of Bitcoin Cash by designing, printing, and distributing high-quality “Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here” stickers. These stickers help merchants proudly display their support for BCH, while also educating customers through visible presence.But we go further than just stickers.With every order, we include a fresh Bitcoin Cash paper wallet preloaded with 1% of the total purchase amount — effectively turning every customer into a BCH holder and giving them a reason to engage with the network. This doubles as a reward system and an onboarding tool.With your support, we’re building a BCH adoption engine — one that’s practical, visible, and rewarding.Why Bitcoin Cash?Bitcoin Cash remains true to the original vision of Satoshi Nakamoto: fast, low-cost, and peer-to-peer money. It is uniquely suited for real-world payments and offers a practical alternative to centralized financial systems.Key advantages:Low fees: Send transactions for fractions of a cent.Fast confirmations: Near-instant acceptance at point of sale.Borderless: Available to anyone with a phone or printed wallet.Sovereign: No third parties required — users hold their own keys.For merchants, BCH is a no-brainer:Cut card processing feesAvoid currency volatility through instant settlementConnect with forward-thinking customersBut visibility is key. That’s where Stickers.cash comes in.Stickers That Spark ConversationsStickers are more than branding — they’re conversation starters. When a customer sees a “Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here” sticker on a window or register, it signals openness, innovation, and financial freedom.Each of our sticker packs is:Designed for merchants, markets, and outreach groupsAvailable in multiple languages and formats (window clings, countertop displays, POS-ready QR signage)Lightweight and shippable worldwideThese stickers are backed by a growing community and movement — and now, they come with something more.Every Order Comes With Bitcoin CashTo turn every order into a chance to experience BCH, we include a preloaded Bitcoin Cash paper wallet with every purchase — equal to 1% of the order amount.This acts like a rewards program, but with real, spendable BCH. Customers are:Encouraged to redeem their wallet and try BCH firsthandIntroduced to self-custody without needing to install apps or register accountsEmpowered to gift or reuse their wallet in future transactionsThis program bridges the gap between curiosity and usage, making every sticker pack a small but powerful driver of real adoption.The wallets come in printed, sealed designs with easy-to-follow instructions and QR codes for quick redemption or sweep into mobile wallets. They’re great conversation pieces — and even better tools for outreach.The Bigger PictureYour support will help us scale this initiative into a full-service adoption engine. Our roadmap includes:Global Fulfillment Improve production and logistics to ship sticker packs and wallets worldwide quickly and affordably.Development of an even better Paper Wallet GeneratorMultilingual ExpansionOffer sticker designs in local languages and cultural styles.Bulk Rewards ProgramsAllow communities and organizers to purchase outreach kits with preloaded wallets and merchant signage.Education ToolsProvide video and print tutorials to onboard users safely and effectively into the world of BCH.Join the MovementBitcoin Cash adoption grows when it’s seen and used. With your help, we can get BCH in more hands and more storefronts — while rewarding every customer along the way.Every sticker placed is a signal. Every wallet given is a door opened. Let’s put BCH in the real world where it belongs.Let’s make peer-to-peer money visible. Let’s make it rewarding. Let’s make it happen together. Simply press the pledge button to donate today!🔗 Visit: https://stickers.cash 🎯 Support the campaign: fundme.cash 💬 Contact: EMAIL: stickerscash@proton.me TELEGRAM: https://t.me/stickersdotcash
