title: A Bitcoin Cash–Powered Gym & community Hub in Juba
description: This campaign is about building long-term impact, not short-term charity.FAME means becoming famous in your own reflection while growing a strong, real-world Bitcoin Cash community.The ProblemIn Juba:Youth unemployment is highAccess to affordable fitness and wellness spaces is limitedBCH adoption is growing, but lacks physical spaces for meetups, education, and coordinationDigital-only communities struggle without consistent in-person engagementAt the same time, many young people are looking for:StructurePurposeSkillsCommunityThe Solution: FAME WellnessFAME Wellness will operate as:A Sustainable Gym Business- Affordable monthly memberships- Group training and fitness programs- Personal training and wellness services- Revenue-generating from day oneA Physical Bitcoin Cash HubA permanent space dedicated to BCH activity, including:BCH meetups & community gatheringsWallet onboarding for new usersBCH education sessionsNetworking for BCH-friendly businessesSponsor-led talks and discussionsIn emerging markets, physical spaces matter.This gym becomes a home base for BCH adoption in Juba.Strengthening the BCH Circular EconomyAt FAME Wellness:Memberships can be paid in BCHBCH is used for daily transactionsStaff are trained in BCH usageNew users are onboarded on-siteThis creates real circulation, not just awareness.Why a Physical BCH Space Is ImportantMeetups need a reliable homeTrust is built face-to-faceMerchants adopt BCH faster with in-person guidanceCommunity momentum compounds when people gather regularlyFAME Wellness provides a consistent, recognizable BCH location in the city. Founder Track Record & BCH History This campaign is led by Emmanuel Lobijo (@Elobijo), a long-time Bitcoin Cash advocate and grassroots community organizer in South Sudan and East Africa. Emmanuel has been actively building BCH adoption since 2018, beginning with feeding initiatives inspired by eatBCH Venezuela. The @eatBCH_SS which Started from a small printing and computer center in Juba called the (Blue Box), he and local volunteers including his mother used Bitcoin Cash donations to cook and distribute food to street children, vulnerable families, flood victims, and displaced persons affected by conflict. His BCH adoption work includes: • Leading eatBCH South Sudan feeding initiatives • Organizing Bitcoin Cash meetups in South Sudan and Uganda • Operating Chap Chap Hot Burger (a BCH-accepting mobile food business) • Establishing a Bitcoin Cash friendly creative/audio studio • Publicly sharing BCH adoption stories and impact updates on X (@Elobijo) And other Projects and adoption efforts. Some documentation of this work: • eatBCH official site and X. • eatbch.org • X: eatBCH_SS Media coverage of eatBCH South Sudan: siamblockchain.com/2018/06/04/bch-powered-charity-eat-bch-starts-feeding-people-in-south-sudan YouTube feature discussing eatBCH work https://youtu.be/O1UjMKnRAuo?si=FGEOvJw2dmORZxYV Emmanuel’s public BCH activity and engagement can be independently verified via his X account: x.com/Elobijo This campaign builds on years of visible, documented Bitcoin Cash adoption work not a new or anonymous effort.Planned BCH Activities (Post-Launch)Monthly BCH meetupsIntro-to-BCH sessions for newcomersMerchant onboarding supportCommunity networking nightsSponsor-hosted AMAs or workshopsNo extra capital required just space and coordination.Budget Breakdown ($20,000 in BCH)Gym equipment (core machines & weights) – $9,000Facility setup & branding – $2,000Initial rent & utilities buffer – $1,500Staff training & launch operations – $1,500BCH onboarding, marketing & community events – $1,000BCH Meet up 12 for 12 Months- $5,000Every expense is tracked and reported transparently.Transparency, Custody & Controls.How funds will be held.All campaign funds will be held in a multi-signature (multi-sig) Bitcoin Cash wallet using the Bitcoin.com Wallet. This ensures no single individual has unilateral control over the funds.Public address & balancesThe BCH wallet address and current balances will be publicly shared and pinned on X (Twitter) so supporters can independently verify funds on-chain at any time.Spending disciplineFunds will be used strictly according to the published budgetAny material change will be communicated in advanceTransactions will be logged and categorized (equipment, rent, setup, operations)Reporting & updatesMonthly financial summaries shared with supportersCash-in / cash-out tracking maintainedProgress updates on launch milestones and BCH activitiesCommunity oversightThis campaign welcomes:Feedback from supportersQuestions on spending or progressAdvice on improving accountabilityTransparency is not a checkbox it is a core principle of this project.About the Founder – Emmanuel LobijoI am a grassroots BCH advocate and community organizer who believes in building.FAME Wellness is not an experiment it is my full-time commitment to:Supporting my community and my family sustainablyCreating opportunities for youthBuilding real BCH adoption infrastructureAm accountable to this community and to every supporter.Why Support This Campaign.By supporting FAME Wellness, you are helping to build:A self-sustaining businessA physical BCH adoption hubLocal employment and skillsA replicable model for BCH-focused community spacesThis is leverage, not charity.Call to ActionIf you believe in:Peer-to-peer cashGrassroots adoptionBuilding real-world infrastructureThen support this campaign, share it, or reach out to collaborate.Let’s build something that lasts. Telegram: @elobijos

title: X/Twitter Tip Bot
description: Bringing Back the BCH Tip Bot for X/TwitterRemember @tipprbot? The Bitcoin Cash tipping bot that let you send BCH to anyone on Twitter with a simple reply? It was one of the best ways to spread BCH adoption — tipping creators, rewarding great posts, and onboarding new users with real Bitcoin Cash in their hands.It's been gone for too long. We're building it back.What we're building:A new, open-source BCH tip bot for X/Twitter. Reply to any tweet with @botname tip @user 0.001 BCH and they'll instantly receive Bitcoin Cash. No sign-up required — recipients get notified and can claim their tip, check their balance, and withdraw to their own wallet anytime.- Tip anyone on X with a single reply- Instant off-chain transfers between users (zero fees between users, 1% platform fee to keep the lights on)- Deposit and withdraw real BCH on-chain- HD wallet with unique deposit addresses per user- Fully open source: https://github.com/BitFaced2/BCH-Tip-BotWhat we need funding for:The X/Twitter API Basic tier costs $100/month — this is required for the bot to read mentions and respond to tips. The code is built and ready to deploy. The only barrier is the API access cost.We're raising 2.57 BCH (~$1,200) to cover the first year of operation. Every satoshi of the crowdfund goes directly to keeping the bot running.Why this matters:Tipping is one of the most powerful onboarding tools in crypto. When someone receives a tip, they're holding real BCH for the first time — no exchange account needed, no KYC, no friction. It turns every conversation on X into a potential gateway to Bitcoin Cash.The original tipprbot distributed thousands of micropayments and helped grow the BCH community. It's time to bring that energy back.Budget breakdown:- X API Basic tier: $100/month x 12 months = $1,200- Server hosting: covered by the 1% tip fee- Development: volunteer (open source)All code is open source and the project is community-driven. If we exceed the goal, extra funds go toward server costs and additional months of operation.

title: BCH Dev Infrastructure and Tooling
description: Hey all, I would like to announce a fundme.cash campaign to fund my work for BCH community for next 3 months (Mar-May 26) strengthening the BCH infrastructure and development tooling in anticipation of May 26 upgrade.This is a relaunch of the previous campaign, but focused on 2 primary projects.Project scope#1 - mainnet-jsContinue forward on the mainnet-js development front after recent big achievements: releasing the v3.0.0 with HDWallet support (https://x.com/mainnet_pat/status/2018289563647570197) with its integration in Cashonize wallet (https://x.com/cashonize/status/2019077673666974092), creation of the new ElectrumCash client library `rpckit`(https://x.com/mainnet_pat/status/2019772722453045418) which has huge stability and resilience enhancements with fallback and cluster meta-transports.I would like to fully migrate to`rpckit` as mainnet-js' network provider; eliminate most of the issue backlog; responding to feature requests (double-spend-proof alert integration, encrypted secret storage, etc.); modernise the project infrastructure for better maintainability.#2 - WalletConnect2 extended specification to support HDWalletsExtend the WalletConnect2 specification (https://github.com/mainnet-pat/wc2-bch-bcr) to support the HDWallets and upgrade Cashonize wallet to use it, update the existing tooling based on mainnet-js and libauth for others to use (https://github.com/mainnet-pat/bch-wc2, https://github.com/mainnet-pat/dapp-starter). This will allow us to harden the stability and reliability of the WC2 in BCH dApps.Contacts:Twitter: https://x.com/mainnet_patTelegram: https://t.me/mainnet_pat

title: Send Kenn to BCH BLISS 2026 Ljubljana, Slovenia
description: Conference: BCH BLISSWebsite: bliss.cashDates: May 15–17, 2026Location: Ljubljana, SloveniaThe Bitcoin Cash community is global.This May, we have the opportunity to put strong BCH media representation on the ground at BCH BLISS in Slovenia, one of the most important Bitcoin Cash focused gatherings in Europe.We’re raising funds to send Kenn Bosak to represent the community, create media, connect with builders, and strengthen BCH’s international presence.Who is Kenn Bosak?Well....this is Kenn Bosak with Roger Ver in 2018!Kenn Bosak is one of the most recognizable grassroots voices in crypto, known for being an early advocate of peer-to-peer digital cash and a longtime champion of Bitcoin Cash. He’s spent nearly a decade traveling to conferences around the world, documenting the community, on-boarding new users, and amplifying builders who are pushing real-world adoption.From hosting meetups and livestreams to collecting and creating NFT’s on WAX, Kenn has consistently bridged culture and technology, making crypto accessible, fun, and human. He’s not just a content creator......he’s a connector, bringing together developers, entrepreneurs, and everyday users under the ethos of permissionless cash. He’s also the inspiration behind 00Tats and the Free BCH Tattoos. Sending Kenn to BCH Bliss in Ljubljana means sending a storyteller and ambassador who will represent the community, create content, and help grow adoption on a global stage.Why BCH BLISS 2026 MattersBCH BLISS is dedicated specifically to the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem.This is where:Developers building on BCH connectInfrastructure projects present updatesAdoption leaders coordinateEuropean BCH communities organizeNew initiatives are bornThis year BCH BLISS is celebrating the "Layla" upgrade which improves developer experience to simplify coding and execution as well as virtual machine efficiency.Having experienced, community-driven media on-site amplifies everything.What Kenn Will Do at BLISS:🎥 Conduct interviews with BCH developers & builders🎙️ Record podcast content and livestreams🤝 Strengthen relationships across Europe📣 Promote peer-to-peer electronic cash🌍 Showcase real BCH adoption stories🔥 Represent grassroots BCH energyThis isn’t passive attendance, it’s active participation and coverage.What the Funds CoverThis campaign will cover:✈️ International flights (USA ↔ Slovenia) 3 BCH🏨 Lodging (May 14–18) 1.5 BCH🍽️ Meals & daily expenses 1 BCH🚕 Local transportation 0.5 BCH🎟️ Premium Conference ticket 1 BCH🎥 Media production costs 1 BCHGoal = 8 BCH: Fully fund the trip so focus stays on impact.What Supporters Receive📹 Exclusive interviews from BCH BLISS🧵 Daily updates and on-the-ground coverage🎙️ Conference recap content🟢 Visibility for supporters (if desired)💚 Strengthened BCH ecosystem presenceThis is community-funded representation, powered by peer-to-peer electronic cash.Transparency CommitmentAfter the event:Full recap of impact and connections madeBreakdown of expensesPublic release of all produced contentLet’s Show What BCH Can DoNo corporate sponsors required.No gatekeepers.Just the community supporting its own.If you believe in Bitcoin Cash and want to see it thrive globally, this is how we show up.💚 Donate in BCH.🌍 Fund grassroots adoption.📡 Send Kenn to BLISS.

title: Print some copies of "The Monterey Protocols"
description: In late January and early February, I wrote a short novella called 'The Monterey Protocols' about events set in August 2026. The book was published directly to the main vox chat channel, but it is also available on the web, and is also available as a pdf. The book was written to challenge the reader to consider questions about strategic civil defense beyond their immediate material needs. It relays a couple key facts and a possible scenario most people won't be familiar with―but that is very real.This fundraiser is to print about a thousand physical copies of the book and distribute them to individuals, bookstores and libraries that want copies. What do we get for our donation?The goal is to print around a thousand copies of the book. This is an eighty (80) page book. It will have a "perfect" or square binding like a traditional book. It will have a color cover, with plain black and white pages. The simplest way to handle distribution is to just mail folks that want one a copy. Some of the funds will cover postage. The book is in the public domain, and a donation address will be included in the inside cover if anyone would like to contribute more. Contributors can of course get a physical copy, either by emailing me at zine@small.neomailbox.ch, by DM on telegram or reddit, or by purchasing the book from an independent bookseller that stocks it. Why not go through a publisher? There is a risk that an unscrupulous publisher might engage in "catch & kill" or deliberate sabotage to delay or harm distribution of the work. Paying for a small run to seed distribution eliminates this risk. ## What does this book have to do with Bitcoin (Cash)?While the subject of the book is a lot bigger than money, the plot does include characters that work for currencies that aren't sanctioned by the current class of global elite. Although the book was published and archived on Bitcoin (Cash), it doesn't mention or enforce any 'freedom' bitcoins directly.The book is about things that can and should transcend commodification.Everyone gets the book, even if the fundraiser fails. This novella will forever exist on the Bitcoin Cash blockchain, as vox messages in the transactions listed on the website. The book is available on github, although the 2qx github account is occasionally blocked and may be permanently blocked in the future. I maintain the means to produce physical copies in limited quantities. If anyone in the Bitcoin Cash community would like a homemade copy of the book, just shoot me a DM of where to send it.

title: The BCH Tattoo Sprinter Van x Cultural Integration
description: For the past several months I have dedicated my life to real world Bitcoin Cash adoption.Not online marketing.Not theory.Physical, permanent, cultural adoption.With 18 years of professional tattooing experience, I am uniquely positioned to execute a Bitcoin Cash marketing strategy rooted in culture, community, and physical visibility.Tattoos are physical, visible, and culturally significant.Each tattoo becomes a walking, talking permanent billboard for Bitcoin Cash.This proposal requests $111,111 worth of BCH to scale the work I have already been doing into a nationwide Bitcoin Cash adoption infrastructure powered by:• The Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van• The Black Agenda × BCH partnership• Ladies Touch Inc. Health Festivals• Melissa Acero Luxury BCH Mansion Parties• Daily BCH media exposureProposal SummaryTotal request:$111,111 worth of BCH(~247 BCH assuming $450/BCH)The funding will support:• Creation of the Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van• The Black Agenda × BCH partnership• Ladies Touch Inc. Health Festivals• Melissa Acero Luxury BCH Mansion Events• Daily BCH podcast and media exposureMy History With BCHI first discovered Bitcoin Cash during the Bitcoin 2025 Conference.After learning about BCH, I quickly realized its importance for:• Financial sovereignty• Economic freedom• Self custody• The Black American consumer economySince then, I have dedicated my work, brand, and artistic title: DARFOR CRISIS AND ESSENTIAL INTERNET CONNECTIVITY
description: Sudan will reconnect with the world** Hello my dear brothers and sisters. As you all know, Sudan is in dire straits, facing difficult circumstances. The Sudanese people desperately need any assistance from their brothers and sisters. Communication and healthcare services are among those that have been completely disrupted. Some families have been separated, with mothers in Sudan and their children abroad. The mother wants to contact her children, but there is no way. We now hope to help this mother and many others to communicate with their children by bringing the Starlink network to the country for public service. Regarding healthcare, the situation is very dire, especially for those of us in the displacement camps in Darfur. In Kalma camp,On 2026 March 1st, a massive fire broke out, burning down a large number of homes and displacing families. Now, there are families truly without shelter, and they need our support. We urge you to take serious action to help them. Thank you. ***Some videos that prove the situation of our people in Darfur due to the fires We are raising 37 BCH ($17,000) to cover the first six months of support, free internet access for all, and food and supplies for those affected. ##Budget Breakdown ($17,000 in BCH)#First, the price of one Starlink device is $500. We need 10 devices to cover an area of ​​18 kilometers or more. Budget details: 10 x $500 = $5000 for these ten devices. #Second, operating fees, i.e., paying the bills for six months at $100 per month, totaling $6000. #Third, support for families affected by the fire: $6000I hope a Bitcoin Cash Can makes amother of Darfor smiles againContact us: X TWITTER https://x.com/AnasIbrahi67822TELLGRAM @ANASIBRAHI
