title: Peer28,a Decentralized  Social Network on BCH.
description: IntroductionThe internet today is dominated by centralized platforms that control user data, censor content, and capture most of the economic value created by users.Peer28 aims to change that.Peer28 is building a decentralized social network where users own their identity, their content, and their financial interactions.Our platform already has:170,000 registered users24,000 daily active users800,000+ users on the waiting listThe next step is migrating Peer28’s economic and infrastructure layers to the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem so that:users control their fundscontent ownership is verifiablecreator payments are peer-to-peerthe platform cannot be shut down by a single entityThis fundraising campaign will help fund the development required to build Peer28 fully on the Bitcoin Cash blockchain.THE BIGGEST MIGRATION OF USERS FROM A PROTOCOL TO BCH. PEER28 ON MVP STAGE WILL ADDED 500K - 1M NEW BCH CHAIN USERS SINCE THE SOCIAL NETWORK WILL BE BUILD ON BCH.SO THE CHAIN VALUE INCREASE SINCE DAY 1 WITH THIS MIGRATION. Why Bitcoin Cash Bitcoin Cash provides a strong foundation for a decentralized social platform.Key advantages include:extremely low transaction feesfast global paymentsscalable infrastructuretokenized assetsopen-source ecosystemUsing Bitcoin Cash allows Peer28 to build a social network where:creators can receive micro-paymentsusers can tip each other instantlydigital assets can be owned directly by usersinfrastructure remains decentralizedWhat Peer28 Will ProvideThe development funded by this campaign will allow Peer28 to build several key components.Decentralized IdentityEach user will have a blockchain-based identity that they control.Benefits:portable accountscensorship resistanceownership of profilesCreator MonetizationCreators will be able to earn directly from their communities through:peer-to-peer tippingdigital collectiblescreator membershipspaid contentThis removes intermediaries that take large commissions.Decentralized Social InfrastructurePeer28 will operate through a network of independent nodes that provide:social feed distributionencrypted messagingcontent relayindexing servicesThis ensures the network remains operational even if any individual service goes offline.Digital OwnershipUsers will be able to mint digital assets representing:creator contentcollectiblesmembershipssocial reputationOwnership of these assets will be secured by blockchain technology.Privacy ToolsPeer28 will integrate privacy-focused transaction tools that allow users to interact economically without exposing unnecessary personal data.Privacy is a key principle for decentralized social networks.Why This Matters for the Bitcoin Cash EcosystemPeer28 represents an opportunity to bring a large real user base into the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem.Current metrics already demonstrate significant traction:170,000 users24,000 daily active users800,000 waiting list usersBy integrating with Bitcoin Cash, Peer28 could introduce hundreds of thousands of new users to the BCH ecosystem.This would help expand:wallet adoptionglobal node infrastructurereal-world usage of BCH technologyDevelopment RoadmapThe goal is to complete the first full version of Peer28 on Bitcoin Cash within 6–8 months.Phase 1 – Blockchain Integrationdeploy the P28 ecosystem tokenintegrate BCH walletsbuild identity systemanchor content on-chainPhase 2 – Node Infrastructurelaunch Peer28 node softwaredeploy global relay networkimplement encrypted messagingPhase 3 – Social Platform Launchrelease decentralized social feedenable creator tippingdeploy NFT marketplacePhase 4 – Privacy Featuresstealth payment toolsprivacy transaction mechanismsencrypted communication infrastructurePhase 5 – Creator Economycreator monetization toolscommunity membership systemsdigital collectibles marketplacePhase 6 – Mobile Apps and Global Expansionmobile appscreator onboardingnode network expansionFunding GoalFunding Target: 350 BCHThis funding will support development of the core platform and infrastructure.Estimated AllocationCategory Allocation protocol development 120 BCHNode infrastructure development 70 BCHWallet and blockchain integration 60 BCHSecurity audits and testing 40 BCHMobile app development 40 BCH Community and documentation 20 BCHAll funds will be used strictly for development and operational costs required to build Peer28 on Bitcoin Cash.TransparencyDevelopment progress will be shared publicly through:regular campaign updatesopen-source code repositoriesdevelopment reportsTransparency is important to maintain trust with supporters and the wider community.RisksAll software development projects carry risks.Potential risks include:technical challenges during blockchain integrationdelays due to development complexityinfrastructure scaling challengesuser adoption uncertaintyWe will communicate openly with supporters about progress and any challenges encountered.Rewards / AcknowledgementThis campaign is donation-based.Supporters will receive:public recognition in the project documentationearly access to the Peer28 platforminvitations to community discussionsNo equity, revenue share, or investment returns are offered.ContactPeer28 is a France-registered companyIf you have questions about the campaign or the Peer28 project, please contact us through:Email: me@amalthomas.com , dev@peer28.comorTelegram: t.me/talktoamalthomasTelegram: t.me/p28dapps ( We don't have any other social media platforms because we are building our own)Peer28 believes the future of social media should be:decentralizeduser-ownedprivacy-respectingpowered by open blockchain infrastructureWith the help of the Bitcoin Cash community, Peer28 can become one of the first large-scale decentralized social networks built on BCH.Your support helps make this possible.The first campaign will be for 104 BCH BCH @ 450$ divided into 5 with progress updated and accounted.

title: Help fund the Vox.cash app suite
description: Vox.cash is a collection of mini-apps that all do one thing.Some of the apps are live at https://vox.cashThere is also a chipnet (testnet) version at https://unspent.dev.The project is open source at https://github.com/2qx/voxContactMy email for this is fundme.2qx@small.neomailbox.ch , I'm on reddit as u/2q_x, and telegram as @a2qx_usernameI develop apps for Bitcoin Cash under the username 2qx. I maintain awesomebitcoin.cash. I was the founding dev on mainnet-js, and since 2022 I've been developing new contracts and protocols at the application later of Bitcoin Cash. These apps include unspent.cash, unspent.app and futurebitcoin.cashMajor Achievements on VoxBitcoin Cash has the first flash-reward token based on coin age (Block Points).The BadgerStake contract now has redundant independent implementations.There are now three competing mechanisms for users to collect a yield without impairment risk to coin principal.Bitcoin Cash now has an on-chain chat protocol, instead of being reliant on centralized third party services.The Vox chat app now generates coupons to support the primary futures markets.Initial manual coupon writing activities to support FBCH markets have ended.Pioneered a dozen reference defi implementations using libauth templates and the HdKeys wallet template.The first (and only) weekly futures market with real coin delivery (in all finance) is now on much better technical footing.The main vox channel was used to publish & archive a draft of a short book forever in perpetuity.We heard noise from some very flattering competition and saw a significant amount of investment come online within the ecosystem.Live mini apps (Alpha stage):Vox Chat: A high signal to noise ratio chat app.CatDex: a commission free bi-directional partial limit order UTXO exchange.Block Points: A NEW 'coindays' based commodity token offering rewards without staking.Smalldb: A simple key-value database for storing temporary records on CashToken commitments.Future BCH with a fresh library and new UIA fresh Badgers app an libraryA fresh Wrapped BCH library and new UIA new Drip (pure-MEV) library and UIStill to do: Subscription lib & interfaceDutch Auction library & app interfaceLocktime (hodl) lib & interfaceTimeout lib & interfaceTrust (annuity) lib & interfaceBlock Tops (BTOP) minable token lib & interfaceBCMR token metadata service and cachingWallet importing/exporting.Implement Flash Loans.Add cauldron AMM threads to CatDex.Publish all 17+ app libraries.Add support for v0-v2 unspent/phi contracts.Publish a new common `unspent` command line interfaceShip a bare-bones automated auto-optimal yield taking appFunding to dateFinancial support for this work came in the form of two donations from private individuals to my CashAccount. I'm very very grateful for the timely support of those individuals.Additional support came from continued monthly payment streams from earlier incarnations of the project.Two attempts to fund raise for parts of the above work via FundMe FAILED in Dec 2024 and June '25.Remaining Timeline, Budget & Future funding model.The goal was to finish all Vox dapps by December '25. Six of the remaining apps are much more straight-forward and simpler than what has been completed already.All vox code is being done manually without any help from any kind of AI or coding agent. Although the market might say coding by hand has no value, the same marketeers might also say our coin and the dozen or so protocols on top of it have no value.The funding goal is 90 BCH total.30 BCH via FundmMe.Cash, 30 BCH in cash, and 30 BCH towards a long-term irrevocable trust.Cash donations may be made here:bitcoincash:qz7xjt4xcpdu2gl75vrvkpwzfpjhy9hnm55gwzyvj4Donations to in perpetuity can be made here:bitcoincash:pdmv95esl9sjzyp9h5rkqz24zr0kp4xxmttc037yc7wn84gtulx7x086f66qxToward a long term funding model, a subscription will be available for 50k per year Badgers/Bpts or 1M WBCH per year. The subscription won't do or unlock anything (because I don't want to maintain service tiers), active subscriptions will just indicate the user supports vox with a heart icon somewhere.What is Vox.cash?In plain terms, vox is a set of mini-apps that each do one thing: annuity, auction, drip, hodl, mine, subscribe, speak, store, timeout, trade, wrap, etc. The vox app is also a testbed for a common library of wallet functions that anyone might one day be able to use from any wallet.The collection takes it's name from the flagship app: vox (meaning voice) because ultimately all freedoms stem from the freedom of speech.The project is the continuation of the aging unspent.app, but with the integrated wallet and CashToken support that were not in the scope of that early project.Vox is following a bit of a different approach to defi. While some bitcoin dapps are based on large monolithic scripts, the bitcoin scripting language lends itself to small versatile scripts that do one thing very well and can be used many times, or even composed together in a more complex transaction.Vox is a bunch of super simple dapps striving to use the shortest spending scripts possible to do one thing.Very small scripts, in addition to being cheap on the blockchain, also tend to carry lower risk, because if every byte of code is risk, designing for the fewest bytes tends to be safer code.Composing these small scripts together in one transaction, or as a sequence of transactions, allows users to accomplish a range of more complex outcomes without the cost of developing a large bespoke contract.Smaller scripts are easier to debug, faster to develop and will end up seeing more usage on the network in practice.Bitcoin Script is often referred to as a "Forth-like" language, and vox/unspent is exploring the benefits and versatility of the forth-like philosophy that was left embedded in our currency project.Open libraries; open platformAny javascript developer with a wallet is free to take and implement any of the app protocols as a first-party app in their own wallet, with the libraries provided or with the base libauth template and their own approach.Conversely, any developer with an emergent idea for a new protocol, that doesn't want to maintain it as an app in perpetuity, is welcome to build it as a mini-app on vox.One day, there may be a common template language all wallets use, and the vox templates can be a suite in that newer format.CatDex cAn HaZ ComMODiTIEs!!On vox.cash, CatDex was created to trade narrowly priced commodity tokens. CatDex will eventually handle aggregated trades across protocols like Cauldron's AMM, TapSwap's open ask markets, and Vox's Dutch Auctions.At present, the commodities deployed/planned for CatDex are Badgers, Block Points, Futures and Block Tops (33 markets in total). But BCH is permissionless and anyone is free to use the CatDex library on their own site to setup a market for any fungible tokens they'd like.There is no plan to list securities or meme tokens, which are much better suited for robustly priced automated maker markets (AMMs). But anyone that has an idea for a commodity token can pitch it for listing on CatDex.The Dutch auction app will support liquidating any kind of CashToken, fungible or non-fungible, including tokenized swap positions (i.e. "stablecoins").Goodbye CashScript SDK, et al.As part of a major overhaul with a view toward portability and long term maintainability, each library supporting each mini app was written (or rewritten) from the ground up with Jason's @bitauth/libauth as the sole dependency.Compiled bytecode from `cashc` is now used to write libauth authentication templates, which are used to construct more complex transactions.This change greatly stabilized the debugging workflow in the omni-debugger BitAuth IDE. The change removed unnecessary middleware to get at the transaction builder and any previous limitations introduced by the CashScript SDK.Each miniapp is backed with an independent mini-library written in a state-less functional programming style. Removing dependencies makes the mini-app libraries available to javascript wallet developers as static functions with the same dependency their wallet likely already relies on. So any javascript wallet should be able to fairly easily deploy any vox miniapp without much fuss, just by adding a UI to their wallet.The new architecture took about two months to get right, writing and debugging the various apps in BitAuth IDE and implementing a new HD defi libauth template workflow from scratch. There were no real complete open source examples to do this, but there are lots now.Any developer in Bitcoin Cash that wants to create a leaner dapp implementation can reference the vox repository as a template.Each BitAuth template can be inspected with the BitAuth button in each miniapp. CashScript source code has been included in the comments of the template for folks coming from solidity style contracts.Still no WalletConnectAlthough vox.cash may eventually support transaction building and signing through a single external centralized point of failure, that is not a priority at this time, i.e. the ETH-style WalletConnect flow is not a near-term goal.What Vox is not. Vox has no oracle-tied swap contracts nor mechanism to create (or redeem) tokenized swap positions.We don't ever want to knock users out of the ecosystem by handing them a contract with a liquidation risk they couldn't quantify. We want to keep, and bee a solid home base for users.What is a *swap*? A swap is a contract to exchange assets at a later time according to agreed upon rules. In practice this ends up being a bitcoin "cash-settled" contract tied to some oracle that is effectively perfectly controlled by a single party with an infinite supply of tether. These apps usually entail a very unfavorable pathway where average users lose all their money to the well capitalized actor on a long enough time scale. The key test these cash-settled swaps fail is that, ultimately, the underlying thing being "traded" is never delivered. There are several very pretty well-finance apps to do swaps in Bitcoin Cash, but those ideas aren't coming to vox.cash.On vox, assets are traded and trades have delivery.If parties, or groups of parties, express a sustained and belligerent interest in exclusively advocating for instruments that have no delivery, time will show that they preferred benefiting from user liquidations over free trade and serving the users of a free currency.

title: Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here- pilot campaign 1
description: 🟢 BCH Accepted HereReviving Real-World Bitcoin Cash AdoptionIn the early days of Bitcoin Cash, one simple sign created excitement everywhere:“Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here.”Across communities, businesses proudly accepted BCH and people could walk in, pay with crypto, and experience peer-to-peer electronic cash in real life.Today, with better tools, more awareness, and growing openness toward crypto, we believe the time is right to bring that energy back.This campaign aims to revive visible BCH merchant adoption by hosting small BCH onboarding sessions inside real businesses.🌍 The Pilot InitiativeWe will begin with a small pilot phase, hosting two Bitcoin Cash adoption sessions at two youth-friendly locations that are ready to accept BCH:• C Lounge – a popular pool and hangout spot where people gather to play snooker, enjoy drinks, and socialize. • Arewa Crave – a local food restaurant serving chips, milkshakes, slush, and other popular meals.Both locations attract a young and active community, making them ideal places to demonstrate real BCH usage.During these sessions we will:• Introduce Bitcoin Cash to customers and nearby businesses • Help participants install BCH wallets • Demonstrate real BCH payments at the venue • Distribute BCH through CashStamps • Add participating merchants to the BCH Argentina Merchant Map, which is now global 🌍💡 Why This MattersBitcoin Cash was created to be peer-to-peer electronic cash for the world.The best way to show that vision is simple:People earning, sending, and spending BCH in everyday places.By onboarding merchants and showcasing BCH payments inside real businesses, we help bring back the spirit of practical BCH adoption and make Bitcoin Cash visible again in our communities.🚀 What This Campaign SupportsThis campaign will help organize the pilot adoption sessions and merchant onboarding activities, including:• BCH swag and merchandise • “Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here” merchant stickers • CashStamp BCH giveaways • BCH pins and educational materials • Logistics for hosting the sessions • Small incentives and discounts for participating merchantsWe will also document the activities through photos and videos, sharing the progress with the global BCH community.💰 Funding Goal2 BCHThis funding will support the pilot phase across the two locations and allow us to begin onboarding businesses to the BCH merchant map.

title: The BCH Tattoo Sprinter Van PHASE 1
description: Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van Proposal – Phase 1 Funding Request ($44,444 in BCH)To the Bitcoin Cash community,First, I want to sincerely thank everyone who offered advice, feedback, and support regarding my previous proposal. The conversations helped me realize that the best way to approach this vision is by breaking the project into clear milestones so the community can see progress step-by-step.Because of that feedback, I’ve restructured the original plan into four phases, with this request representing Phase 1.Before explaining the new structure, I also want to briefly address something that came up publicly. Some tweets suggested that my earlier request meant I was trying to buy a mansion and put a BCH sticker on the mailbox. While it may have been framed as a joke, it came across as questioning my integrity and the work I’ve been doing for Bitcoin Cash.Anyone who has followed my work knows that real-world BCH marketing is exactly what I do.Over the past months I have:• Given 75+ Bitcoin Cash tattoos• Onboarded 100+ Selene Wallet users• Helped onboard Tetra 9 Lounge as a BCH merchant hub in Denver• Represented BCH at conferences and events• Co-hosted #NotAnotherBitcoinPodcast with Kenn Bosak• Distributed CashStamps and onboarded new BCH users in personThis is boots-on-the-ground adoption.So yes — the mansion I’m planning to buy is the Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van.The truth of that “joke” is that I’ll likely live in the van for long stretches of time, traveling city-to-city giving BCH tattoos, onboarding merchants, producing media content, and spreading Bitcoin Cash adoption in the real world.Why the Proposal Is Now Structured in PhasesBased on community feedback, the original proposal has now been divided into four milestones, allowing the BCH community to evaluate progress at each stage before moving forward.This ensures transparency, accountability, and measurable impact.Phase 1 – $44,444 BCH (Current Request)Phase 1 focuses on launching the operational foundation for the Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van initiative.This includes establishing the core infrastructure needed to begin the BCH adoption tour and proving the concept at scale.The Bitcoin Cash Tattoo Sprinter Van will function as a:• Mobile tattoo studio giving BCH tattoos• BCH onboarding station helping people download wallets and send their first transaction• Traveling podcast/media studio producing daily BCH content• Merchant onboarding vehicle bringing BCH acceptance to local businesses• Real-world marketing platform representing BCH at events and communitiesEvery tattoo becomes a permanent walking billboard for Bitcoin Cash.My mission has always been simple:Take BCH out of the internet… and put it into culture.Thank you again to everyone who has supported the vision, provided guidance, and helped shape this proposal into something stronger.— 00TATT$The Black James Bond with a Tattoo GunLicensed to InkMission: BCH FTWCheck out the details of my last campaign in the link below:https://fundme.cash/campaign/111

title: BitcoinCashOG: BCH Marketing & Community Growth
description: Bitcoin Cash: Empowering BCH Marketing and Community GrowthFunding requested 14.5 BCH (~ €390 / BCH)Deliverables & Costs Breakdown:3 Months work (April 2026 - June 2026)Bitcoin Cash Marketing via @BitcoinCashOG on x.com3 months X Premium Plus subscription: €11478 hours (€70 p/h) €5460 (1 hour per day Monday-Saturday)FundMe fee 1.5%Last Campaign (December-March 2026) Delivery & Results:104 hours work: March's not even done, and we had a target of 10,000 followers and we're close to 12,000, with over 1,000,000 impressions and growing fast.9.8% Engagement rate5.9k Verified FollowersTotal 3164 postsBCH Promoting Podcasts / Stakeholder engagement and alignment / behind the scenes magic ✨Why This Campaign?Bitcoin Cash is the best money that the world has ever created and has some of the best developers and engineers in the space. There’s just one, tiny, but important challenge to overcome! Getting people educated about this amazing technology and then using it!Despite having a market cap of over 10 billion dollars, Bitcoin Cash has a total marketing budget of a rounding error of a rounding error … marketing and outreach can be improved tremendously!This is a big challenge, and the running and growing of BitcoinCashOG on X.com is an important strategy to tackle this. Social media is a great way to reach millions or even billions of people, and Bitcoin Cash benefits from a prominent, easily discoverable presence on X.com.When large accounts, such as news outlets or crypto exchanges, tweet about a coin, they often use @links to the largest handles representing those coins. This allows X users to simply click the account hyperlink and hit follow on that account to stay in the loop with the latest, greatest news from that coin and its community. Until recently, Bitcoin Cash was the odd coin out and didn't have such an account. People are lazy, they likely won’t even hit the search bar. Even if they do, they will not find any large BCH account to follow, and therefore probably wont follow anyone in the space nor get any news on their feed. Worse still, they may likely conclude that BCH is a dead project with no people in it!@BitcoinCashOG solves this to ensure that when Bitcoin Cash is mentioned in a social media post, it can link to a:Well curatedGood vibes onlyPG 13Non-politicalNon-exclusionaryBeacon of pure BCH goodnessThis project aims to continuously improve the perception of BCH to be the lively, thriving ecosystem we all know and love, with boundless opportunity. The strategy relies on community buy in and support! Goals and Vision:Grow the AccountMilestone 1: 100 followers - end of week 2 (Completed 10th August 2025 / 11 days ahead of schedule 🎯)Milestone 2: 1000 followers – November (Completed 22nd September / 6 weeks ahead of schedule 🎯)Milestone 3: Rename to Bitcoin Cash (BCH) 🎯Milestone 4: 10,000 followers - February 2026 🎯Milestone 5: 20,000 followers - June 2026Milestone 6: Become a primary BCH social media account for third party wallets / exchanges to link to.Content Strategy: 4 posts/day, themes include:Merchant Monday:(adoption focus),Did You Know Tuesday: Getting to know the ecosystem products and peopleMid-Week Geek Out:(education),Mid-Week Marketing: Grassroots marketing encouragement.Feel-Good Friday:(engagement), and positive, informative updates.Spotlight Saturday: Highlight key aspects of the ecosystem in the week.Community Benefits: Provide a clean, positive, high signal channel where anyone can learn about BCH's potential as everyday digital cash. Amplify user stories, dev projects, and real-world uses to inspire more adoption. Protect the key messaging of decentralisation, no official account, foundation, or entity behind Bitcoin Cash.Account Guidelines: The account has clear guidelines to ensure that it remains an overwhelmingly positive force for the Bitcoin Cash Community and network.Posts from BitcoinCashOG are designed for maximum positive impact for the network and community, that hold the community and the network’s best interests at heart. To achieve this there are some guidelines to help keep posts, content, and frequency on point:4-5 posts per day (average)- Replies to other posts are not limited in numberPosts spread out where possible to cover 24 hoursNo profanityNo pornographic postsNo overly political posts- Although Bitcoin Cash is inherently political so will be a balanceNo talking of priceNo opinions on protocol changes- Posting of proposed changes to keep people informed is ok, but posts should be handled neutrally.No aggressive language or attacking / antagonistic behaviour. Will use humble humour and facts as a retort.No supporting any flipstarter/fundme. Reporting of successful campaigns is okIdeas on general themes on days (at least one post will match the theme on that day)Thank you so much for reading and for any and all donations!Have some questions? Reach out on @BitcoinCashOG on X.com or via the BitcoinCashOG telegram group and we’ll be happy all questions and get you as excited as us! Let’s do this 💪

title: Return to Venezuela
description: Who am I?Hello everyone, my name is Hampherny Rico, or better known on social media as (@HamphernyR). I've been working intensively on Bitcoin Cash adoption since 2022.I started by facilitating its adoption in businesses in collaboration with Satoshi's Angels, and then I launched an adoption program at universities in Caracas. My most impactful project to date took place in 2023 at the Central University of Venezuela, recognized worldwide as the best university in Venezuela and one of the best in Latin America and the world. In my recent work, I've brought over 5,000 new users into the ecosystem, and currently, more than 20 entrepreneurs and merchants in Caracas accept Bitcoin Cash. These results have been verified over the past few years. Adoption in Caracas remains active, but organically. This means I've done very little work in recent months, but adoption continues to thrive and grow every day.Trip to ArgentinaIn October 2024, I traveled to Argentina to attend the Bitcoin Cash conference held in Buenos Aires. Since then, I have lived in this country for over 17 months, participating in various activities and learning about the adoption of Bitcoin Cash in this country.In other words, I have gained a wealth of experience and knowledge to bring back to Venezuela and further promote its adoption.Cash StampsA week ago, in collaboration with Cash Stamps, we began incorporating new users in Caracas. Thanks to this, the fire of Bitcoin Cash adoption is being revived in Caracas and throughout Venezuela.I have received new invitations to conduct new educational events and workshops at UCV, and because of this, and because I know I can contribute much more to the adoption of Bitcoin Cash in my own country, I have decided to return.Return to VenezuelaSo, through this campaign, I'm asking for support to cover some of the expenses of my return to Venezuela.Some of you might be wondering why you should support me with this and how it will benefit you. If you support me, first of all, upon my arrival I will focus on working full-time to promote the adoption of Bitcoin Cash. I'll be able to increase the number of Cash Stamps distributed, meaning there will be many more users for Selene Wallet and Bitcoin Cash in generalI will also work diligently to increase the number of businesses that accept BCH as a payment method and add them to the maps already established by the community. If you support my return to my country as soon as possible, this small investment will become a great benefit to the Bitcoin Cash community. I'm requesting 1.4 BCH, which is $658 at the current BCH price ($470). With this money, I'll only need to buy a plane ticket and cover some other minor expenses. It's important to note that if I receive this significant support, I'll be able to travel as soon as possible and begin the adoption process in Caracas. However, if I don't receive it within the established timeframe, I'll still try to travel on my own, but I don't know when I'll be able to travel and I won't be able to fully dedicate myself to Bitcoin Cash adoption. Finally, thank you for reading the entire campaign and for your support. For any questions or additional collaborations outside of the campaign, you can reach me on X and Telegram as (@HamphernyR).

title: Club Cup BCH 2026 La Habana - CUBA
description: Bringing Bitcoin Cash to the people of Havana through the sport we love.The most exciting BCH tournament of the world is here again! This is our Fundme.Cash campaign for make a tournament of 8 teams, knockout style, right here in Havana. But this year is bigger, we bringing more BCH gifts to the fans and the real people in the street, can have BCH in their hands. No bank, no permission, no government in the middle. Just scan and you got it.📖 A Brief History: How we get hereThis thing no start big. It start with a simple idea. what if we use the sport that every Cuban love to show them something that can change their life?In Cuba, the financial system is... complicated, you know? The people don't have access to international banks, the local currency lose value every day, sending money from outside is expensive and slow, and the government control almost everything. For many Cubans, there is no way to save money that actually keep the value. Bitcoin Cash change that. Is peer-to-peer, is fast, the fees are almost nothing, and nobody can block your transaction. For us, that is not just technology that is freedom.So we say: ok, let's bring BCH to the people, but not with a boring conference or a class in a room. No. We bring it through football, because that is where the people are, that is where the energy is, that is where Havana come alive.⚽ 2024 — The Year It All BeginThe first Club Cup BCH was in 2024. That was the seed, hermano. We no have big sponsors, we no have a big plan — we just have the conviction that Bitcoin Cash and football can open doors in Cuba.But even in that first edition, we make a statement. In the finals, the players wear t-shirts with #FREEROGER — showing support for Roger Ver, one of the most important voices for Bitcoin Cash and economic freedom in the world. That moment was powerful, because it connect a football tournament in Havana with a global movement. The players, many of them hearing about BCH for the first time, they wear that message on their chest. They no understand everything about the politics of crypto that day, but they understand one thing: this community fight for freedom, and that is something every Cuban feel deep in the soul.That first tournament was also where we make the initial connection with the Cuban community. We meet the players, the families, the neighbors who come to watch the games. We start the conversations. We show them the wallet on the phone. Some of them look at us like we crazy, you know? "Money in the phone? Without a bank? Que cosa es eso?" But some of them, some of them get it immediately. They see the potential. And those people become the foundation of everything that come after.The 2024 edition was small, but it plant the roots. Without that first tournament, nothing else happen.🏆 2025 — The Year Cuba Become #1 in the WorldIf 2024 was the seed, 2025 was the explosion. In the second edition of Club Cup BCH, something incredible happen. During the tournament, Cuba become the number 1 country in the entire world for Selene Wallet downloads. Not number 2, not top 5 — number 1. The TOP country in the planet. And this is not something we just say to look good, hermano this milestone was verified directly by the Selene Wallet developer. A small football tournament in a neighborhood of Havana put Cuba above every other country on Earth for BCH wallet adoption. That is real impact. That is what community do when you give them the right tools.But we no stop there. In 2025 we also start connecting Bitcoin Cash with other freedom technologies. In Cuba, internet access is limited and expensive — the government control the connectivity. So the community build mesh networks, local networks that connect people without depending on the traditional internet infrastructure. These mesh networks are a lifeline for many Cubans.During the 2025 tournament, we gifted mesh network antennas to the MVP of each weekend. Think about that for a moment — the best player of the day no just receive a trophy or a certificate. He receive a tool that give him and his community better connectivity, better access, more freedom. We connect the sport with the tools that actually change the daily life of the people.That is the philosophy of Club Cup BCH: every experience we create, we connect it with a freedom tool. Bitcoin Cash for financial sovereignty. Mesh antennas for communication sovereignty. Selene Wallet for easy access. CashStamps for instant onboarding. #FREEROGER t-shirts to connect with the global fight. Everything we do is a bridge between the game on the field and the freedom in real life.🔥 2026 — The Elite Eight: Where We Going NowSo look at the timeline:·2024: We start from zero with CashStamps. First tournament. #FREEROGER in the finals. First contact with the community. The seed is planted.·2025: We grow with CashStamps boosting BCH adoption. Cuba become #1 in the world for Selene Wallet downloads. We gift mesh antennas to MVPs. The roots go deep.·2026: Now we bring this new edition better teams, more fans, more impact. The tree is giving fruit.Every year we add a new layer, a new tool, a new way to connect freedom with the daily life of the Cuban people. This is not a one-time event — this is a movement.🌐 Why Bitcoin Cash Matter So Much in CubaMaybe if you live in a country with a normal bank account and a credit card, you don't understand why this is so important. So let me explain like a Cuban explain:·The peso lose value every week. The people work hard and the money they earn today buy less tomorrow. BCH is unique and decentralized.·Sending money from family outside is a nightmare. Western Union, the fees, the exchange rate the government put — the family lose a big percentage. With BCH, you send from Miami to Havana in seconds and the fee is less than one cent.·The banks don't work for us. Most Cubans cannot open international accounts, cannot use PayPal, cannot use Venmo, cannot receive payments from freelance work abroad. BCH don't ask you for a passport or a credit score. You download the wallet, you have an address, you are in the global economy.·Internet is controlled and expensive. That is why mesh networks matter. When you combine BCH with mesh networking, you create a system where the people can transact and communicate without depending on the structures that limit them.This is not about speculation or trading charts. For Cuba, Bitcoin Cash is a survival tool and a freedom tool, and we are proud to be part of bringing it to more people through something as beautiful as football.⚽ Meet the Elite Eight. The 8 Teams Fighting for the CupThis is not a friendly tournament where everybody go home happy. These 8 teams earn their spot and they come to win:🏆 FC Galaxy (Defending Champion) The kings of 2024 and2025. They got the crown and they not planning to give it back. Every team in this tournament got one thing in common — they all want to beat Galaxy. Can they do it again? We gonna see.⚡ @cujae_fc CUJAE, one of the most important universities in Havana. These boys bring that student energy: young, fast, and with something to prove. Never underestimate the university kids, hermano.🔵 UD Marianao FR Marianao is a tough neighborhood and this team play like it. Physical, organized, and they don't give up. They bring the people from the barrio to the stands and the atmosphere change when they play.🎓 Universidad del Deporte CF This is the sports university of Cuba, compadre. These guys literally study football. They know the tactics, the formations, the theory. Can the classroom beat the street? In this tournament, we find out.💚 FC Querejeta Querejeta is a community with deep roots in Havana sports. This team represent that tradition. Solid, experienced, and they always show up ready. Don't sleep on Querejeta.🔴 Atlético Cuevita. Heart. That is the word for this team. Maybe they not the biggest names, maybe they not the favorites, but Atlético Cuevita play every ball like is the last one. The kind of team that make the tournament exciting.⚫ Inter Varona. Varona bring that intensity from the east side of Havana. Fast counterattacks, strong defense, and a crowd that make noise from the first minute to the last. When Inter Varona play, you feel it.🟡 FC Boyeros. Boyeros is one of the biggest municipalities in Havana, and this team carry that weight with pride. They got depth, they got ambition, and they coming into 2026 with the mentality that this is their year.📱 This year we use Selene Wallet + CashStamps, the most powerful combo in BCH ecosystem.After we make Cuba the #1 in the world for Selene Wallet downloads in 2025, this year we go even further.·We gonna print 50 CashStamps — physical cards with a QR code, beautiful design, something the fans can keep.·The fan just scan the code with the phone and boom — the BCH go direct to the Selene Wallet. First time for many of them!·No need to buy nothing, no complicated thing. You scan, you receive. That simple. The people see how fast this network is with their own eyes.·For many people in the crowd, this is the first time they hold any cryptocurrency. We don't just give them a card — we give them a door to a new financial reality.🎯 Fundme.Cash Goal: 2.50 BCHWe adjust the goal to 2.50 BCH because we need to cover the CashStamps, the printing, the field, everything. We try to be very transparent with where every satoshi go.💰 The Budget — Where the BCH goesBCH CashStamps: Pre-loading 50 stamps for the fans (onboarding). 0.35 BCHPrizes & Incentives: BCH rewards for 1st place, 2nd place, and Top Scorer. 0.65 BCHField & Officials: Rent the pitch, pay the referees and medical staff. 0.45 BCHMedia & Tech: Photos, video recap, social media content. 0.35 BCHLogistics: Equipment, water, hydration, field maintenance for the entire tournament. 0.40 BCHMarketing & Printing: Print the CashStamp cards, banners, flyers. 0.3 BCHTOTAL: 2.50 BCH📡 More than football. More than crypto. This is freedom, compadre.Look at what we already do in just two years: we start with #FREEROGER t-shirts and a dream in 2024. In 2025 we put Cuba as #1 in the world for Selene Wallet downloads and we give mesh antennas to the MVPs so their communities have better connectivity. We introduce hundreds of people to Bitcoin Cash through something they already love the game.Every tournament we connect a new experience with a new freedom tool. In 2024 it was the message #FREEROGER, solidarity, the first handshake with the community. In 2025 it was the antennas and the wallets. In 2026 it is the CashStamps. We don't just talk about adoption, we put it in the hands of the people, literally.When you support this campaign, you are not just funding a football tournament. You are funding financial education, digital sovereignty, and real tools for people who need them the most. Cuba is not a big market, Cuba is a community that is hungry for freedom, and Bitcoin Cash is one of the most powerful tools we can give them.From #FREEROGER to #1 in the world. From zero wallets to CashStamps in the hands of the fans. This is what three years of grassroots work look like.📢 Follow everything here: @RelampagoCupBCH 📢 Live updates from the field: @clubcupbchHelp us reach 2.50 BCH and let's make 2026 the year we show the world what real adoption look like — from the streets of Havana, with a ball and a dream. Vamoooooooos! ⚽

title: BCH Booth @ Futurist Conference 2026
description: The Futurist Conference is the largest crypto conference in Canada, located in Toronto, and is on its 9th year. Their 2024 highlights note 7000+ attendees, 250+ speakers, 100+ press/media, and 200,000+ online views. This year it runs on July 21st and 22nd.Futurist spawned from ETHToronto, so it has a very heavy EVM & smart contracts focus. I attended in 2023 and noted that there was essentially zero Bitcoin/BTC representation since 'nothing is really happening' in it. Having BCH represented with a booth and a couple people that know about the new contracts and app ecosystem that is starting may help draw some outside attention to the ecosystem, be it students, developers, or investors.Futurist had attendees self-select what they considered themselves, and ended up with:Students: 5%Policy/Regulation: 8%Service Providers: 17%Developers: 18%Power Users: 22%Institutional: 26%Crypto Infrastructure/Apps: 30%Investors: 41%Your Booth RunnersSayoshi Nakamario - me! I've learned and done a bunch of random stuff. I enjoy teaching and talking about BCH contracts for some strange reason, which is why I created the BitcoinCashUniversity youtube channel. This Bliss conference presentation gives a good overview of my journey:Jerry (@Lightswarm) has offered to be the second booth runner. He is also a BCH app/contract developer, has an in-depth knowledge of the ecosystem, ran many BCH meetups (Bitcoin Bay), already lives in the area, and has also been to past Futurist events.Performance TrackingTo help track whether the funds to have BCH represented at this conference were 'worth it' we would track these metrics and give a report afterwards:# attendees that interacted with the booth# attendees onboarded to a BCH wallet# devs/students spoken to about developing on BCH# attendees interested in specific BCH appsMinimum Costs (in CAD$):$5000: Booth Sponsorship (includes 2 tickets, standing booth, booth signage, BCH logo on digital signs, Futurist website, etc.)$1000: Sayoshi Flight $600: Sayoshi Hotel $200: High visibility BCH shirts for booth hosts $400: Incidentals (meals, taxis, etc.)Total: $7200 CAD ($5173 USD)Short fundraise time is to try and lock-in early-bird pricing which is expiring soon. I've already been in touch with the Futurist organizers regarding this.If extra funds are raised above the minimum then we would ideally get a larger booth ($10k), otherwise it will go to additional giveaway swag & onboarding.If the BCH price falls substantially and can't cover the minimum costs then the funds will be returned to the addresses that pledged them.If any big pledgers want to advertise BCH at the conference in a bigger way there are a bunch of conference-level options still available - contact me @sayoshinakamario (telegram) or @SayoshiHelpMe (X/twitter)

title: Find room for 2nd MEETUP BCH SPAIN in MADRID
description: This coming April 18th, 2026, we will be holding our 2nd BCH Spain Meetup in Madrid, following the success of the 1st Meetup in Benidorm (Alicante).For this event, we need to rent a venue.Our goal is not just to hold this 2nd Meetup, but to start a movement where these Meetups are replicated throughout Spain.However, we do need your help for this Meetup.It involves many hours of dedication, preparation, and other expenses that we cover without receiving any financial compensation. Our reward and satisfaction comes from seeing people become interested and want to incorporate Bitcoin Cash into their lives.This is our website: https://bchesp2p.org/This is a summary of our first Meetup: https://bchesp2p.org/1-meetupIf you'd like to become a sponsor, our contact information is available on our website: https://bchesp2p.org/Any money left over after the venue rental fee will be kept in our donation account for future Meetups.Thank you

title: FAME Wellness – Bitcoin Cash powered gym
description: FAME Wellness – Bitcoin Cash powered gym and community hub. From Proof to Action in South Sudan My name is Emmanuel Lobijo. Since 2018, I have been actively building Bitcoin Cash adoption on the ground in South Sudan not just online, but in real life.I have Led local feeding initiatives through eatBCH South SudanOrganized BCH meetups and onboarded new usersBuilt and operated a BCH-accepting food business (Chap Chap Hot Burger, And others)Created spaces where people could earn, spend, and understand BCHThis journey has not been perfect. Some projects worked. Some failed. I have learned from both. And this campaign is built on those lessons.The Reality in Juba today. Most gyms are expensive and Many are located in hotels and Access is limited for everyday youth. At the same time Youth are actively looking for structure, fitness, and purpose There is growing interest in BCH but no consistent physical spaceWhat Happened Before, I recently ran a campaign to build a BCH-powered gym and community hub. It was not funded. Instead of walking away, I came back to the community and asked Why? The feedback was clear Show real demand, Prove people will pay and Start small and sustainable so I listened. Previous campaign. https://fundme.cash/campaign/105What I Did Next I went back to the ground and collected real data. Survey Results (31 Responses). 97% (30/31) said they would use the gym, 97% (30/31) said they would join as early members Payment, 45% prefer daily payments, 32% prefer monthly 16% prefer weekly. This shows Strong demand exists Flexible pricing is essential.BCH Readiness~20% ready to pay in BCH today, Majority open but need guidance, This means BCH adoption will happen through onboarding, not assumption.The Plan is to Start Small, Start Real This is no longer about building a big gym. This is about starting with what is needed to operate immediately.Phase 1: Basic free weights Bench & squat rack Simple training space Low-cost setup on land I already have so No rent, No large overhead, No unnecessary expansion.The land is measuring 20 by 20 Square Maters.Funding Goal: 34.25 at 437.93 USD per 1 BCH on 6th April, Equivalent to $15,000 USD for (Equipment + Setup Only).This funding will go strictly to Core gym equipment, Basic setup and structure Branding (simple, visible identity), No salaries, No large operational buffer, No unnecessary spending. Every dollar goes into making the gym operational.Budget Breakdown ($15,000 / 34.25 BCH)Gym Equipment – $10,000 (22.83)Setup (structure + floor) $3,000 (6.85)Branding & signage $1,000. (2.28)Launch & onboarding $1,000 (2.28)The majority of funds go directly into equipment so the gym can start generating revenue immediatelyWhat Happens After Launch. From day one Members start using the gym, Revenue starts coming in Daily, weekly, and monthly payments. BCH introduced gradually through real usage.Why This Matters for BCH. This is not theory. This is Real people, Real usage, Real transactions, BCH becomes part of daily life, Paying for gym access, Learning wallets setup, Spending locally. What Makes This Different Now. Before it was an Idea Now it has Proven demand, Real users ready, Clear pricing insight, Lean execution plan.Accountability & Transparency.Funds tracked publicly, Clear updates on progress, Community feedback welcomed, Focus on measurable outcomes.Why This Matters to Me.This is not just a business. This is A way to support my family, A way to create opportunities for youth, A way to build real BCH adoption in my community.If you believe in Building real-world BCH adoption, Supporting grassroots initiatives, Creating sustainable businesses.Support this campaign, Share it, Or reach out to collaborate.This is not starting from zero this is starting from proof.@Elobijos on Telegram @Elobijo on X

title: Adoption Bitcoin Cash Northwest
description: Project: P2P D2D Financial Sovereignty InitiativeThe traditional banking system is built on a foundation of debt, surveillance, and impending collapse. We are launching a boots-on-the-ground campaign across the Pacific Northwest (Spokane are surrounding areas) to break the chains of financial dependency.The MissionWe are traveling town-to-town to engage our local communities directly. This is not about passive advocacy; it is about active, face-to-face education. We are going door-to-door to demonstrate why Bitcoin Cash is the only viable alternative to the failing fiat regime. We aim to equip households with the knowledge to set up non-custodial wallets and the understanding that true financial autonomy lies in peer-to-peer exchange—not in centralized banks that view people as collateral.The NeedOur success relies on mobility and clear, tangible messaging. We are seeking funding to cover:Logistics: Fuel and travel costs for distributing to high population neighborhoods.Educational Materials: High-impact, physical resources that explain the failures of currency, the reality of the corruption of traditional finance, and the immediate utility of Bitcoin Cash.Infrastructure: Support for the time and tools required to sustain a consistent local presence on the road without loosing precious time to lack of resources.The GoalBy teaching the community we create a network of savvy, sovereign individuals, we are creating a localized economy that is impervious to the turbulence of failing national institutions. We are shifting the power dynamic from the state to the individual.Every satoshi contributed directly accelerates our reach. Help us secure the ground, educate the neighborhood, and build the future of money in the Pacific Northwest.The banks are failing; share the alternative. Contribute to our community initiative.

title: Selene Wallet 2026
description: Selene FundMe 2026Fundraiser Target: 375.5 BCH ($170,477 USD)Assumed BCH Price: $454 USD/BCH2025 Retrospective and Review2025 was a year of stable growth that has allowed Selene Wallet to reach a point of relative maturity. According to our stats tracker, we had 3400 unique devices that have confirmed at least one transaction, with an average of 600 monthly active users. Our current growth metrics indicate that we are retaining approximately 40 new economic users per month.In commitment to full transparency in our roadmap, we've created a spreadsheet to track our promised fundraiser deliverables over all-time:Spreadsheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1t-S5c-kWwtgQ90OdLfs31F_xZ_tkBJD_Q9DMF9GwPRw/edit?usp=sharingPromised and delivered:- Dark Mode- Vendor Mode- Improved Tx History- BChat ("Secret Project")- Server upgrade (increased storage & bandwidth)- Travel & Media presence: - BTC Vegas 2025 coverage - BCH BLISS keynote & panel - BLAZE workshop and mentoringOpportunistic/Unpromised, but delivered:- Full Wallet Encryption / Cloud Sync support- Improved coin control / assets screen- NFT viewer- Stablecoin Mode- WizardConnect- Welsh language translations- Dance.cashPromised, still in-progress:- CashFusion: the bulk of the code is written and awaiting integration. We anticipate full implementation by end of Q2 2026.- Improved Stats: Minor improvements on the app side are imminent, with more comprehensive stats planned to be presented alongside further improvements to our website. Website improvements will coincide with further development on Bchat.- Additional in-app utilities: Many are written, pending UI upgrades to make sure the wallet doesn't feel bloated, unfocused, or confusing. Examples: address manager, QR code generator, currency conversion calculator.- Integration with other BCH products: currently Stablecoin mode is the primary focus; awaiting XO stack for deeper integrations. Promised, not yet delivered:- Shareable Link: pending implementation in Q2 or Q3 2026.- CashConnect: still pending full protocol release - we're not fully confident in allocating development resources to CashConnect at this time as only one product in the entire ecosystem currently uses it. It may end up superceded by WizardConnect and/or XO stack. We will continue to monitor CashConnect development.- Maps: As noted last year, the "map problem" requires tight coordination across the ecosystem. Paytaca and BCH Argentina are currently taking the lead on this problem and we will consider integrating with their map platforms. - i18n platform: Demand for crowdsourced translations has died down since we launched. This is still a nice-to-have, but is currently low priority. It becomes more pertinent as we develop more products that will require internationalization.Selene Stats and Funding HistoryOur in-app stats track unique devices that have a wallet with at least one *confirmed* transaction. This measures user retention rather than raw install count.In 2025 our stats show:- 3400 Annual Users- 600 MAU- 300 WAU- 100 DAU- Growth Rate: ~40 new economic users monthlyThese stats give us a realistic EOY goal to increase our growth rate to 120 new economic users monthly (minimum +720 MAU). We will accomplish this through continued product development with a new emphasis on marketing.Capital Efficiency Metrics- Total funds raised: 845 BCH ($251,550) - May 2023: 150 BCH @ $117 USD/BCH ($17,550) - March 2024: 270 BCH @ $300 USD/BCH ($81,000) - May 2025: 425 BCH @ $360 USD/BCH ($153,000) - User Acquisition Cost: $251,550 / 3400 users = ~$74/user - We use the base 2025 annual user count because we assume some users are duplicated across all 3 years - Our user acquisition cost is approximately 2x-5x lower than the software industry average.- Average Development Cost: $251,550 / 3 years / 2 engineers: $41,925 per year per engineer - Our development cost per engineer is approximately 3x-4x lower than the software industry average.Global Selene Impact: visible adoption initiatives- Argentina: Since launch, Argentina has consistently been the #2 largest user base by country, behind USA. This is quite possibly our biggest success story; Argentines have demonstrated real-world need for sound money and a wallet that "just works." We've received major support from BCH Argentina and friends, and owe much of our success to the Argentine userbase. At the time of writing, there are 120 installed users tracked by Google Play. We anticipate the real user count in Argentina to be higher than stated due to the relative popularity of the direct APK installation. Our upcoming Stablecoin Mode was also directly requested by users in Argentina, allowing them to transact in BCH without worrying about price volatility.- Nigeria: Nurain and the rest of the Nigerian crew have been Selene advocates since launch, creating their own merch and events to foster local awareness. The results are clear: Nigeria has added approximately 50 new Android users over the past 12 months.- Townsville: Reports from Bitcoin Jason and Noel Lovisa suggest that Selene is the go-to wallet for replacing Bitcoin.com. Jason eagerly shares footage of his coffee and lunch purchases with real-world merchants. According to Google Play, at least 20 new Australian Android users have persisted after onboarding in the past 12 months.- Las Vegas: Kallisti's presence at BTC Vegas 2025 allowed the fateful recruitment of Kenn Bosak and 00TATTS who are both proving to be valuable assets to the BCH community. There is a local Vegas meetup group as well as ongoing onboarding initiatives through the 00TATTS marketing campaign, which Selene sponsors directly.- Grand Rapids: Kallisti's hometown. Selene Wallet has a booth at the 2026 Libertarian National Convention which will be hosted there. We are also building a promising relationship with a local merch/fashion supplier.- Cuba: Google Play metrics showed major growth in Cuba thanks to their mesh network and football team initiatives. From May to August 2025, there was a surge from 20 installed users to 109 installed users at the peak. However, user count has fallen slowly over the following 8 months back down to 20 users.Breakdown of CostsBaseline Operating Costs: $26,350 / year (58 BCH)At a baseline, we have a minimum annual expenditure of $26,350 (58 BCH). We must pay these expenses in order to operate.- Administrative: $21,697 / year - Michigan LLC Registration: $250 / year - Business Mailing Address & Phone: $348 / year - Apple Developer License: $99 / year - Building costs (Kallisti Home/Office): $21,000 / year- Infrastructure: $4653 / year - Server costs: $1641 / year - Internet and Cellular: $1440 / year - Energy Costs: $1572 / year ($131/mo average)Product and Business Development: 307.5 BCH ($139,605)- Kallisti: full time engineering, user support, infrastructure maintenance, business & product development, engineering management: 205 BCH ($93,070) - In 2026, the median income for experienced software engineers in Kallisti's area is currently ~$124,000, according to available public data. - Subtracting the Baseline Operating Costs and Travel Costs, $93,070 (~205 BCH) remains in discretionary income for Kallisti.- Jeremy: part time engineering, user support, business & product development, marketing management, 'investor' relations: 102.5 BCH ($46,535) - We price Jeremy's contributions at roughly half the amount of Kallisti's, reflecting his capacity for involvement while also working on the Bitcoin Cash Podcast and BCH Bliss, which have their own funding outside of Selene. - Jeremy provides critical support for Kallisti, sharing equal responsibility in business and product development, and having done most of the outreach for our additional development and funding contributors.Conferences & Travel: 10 BCH (~$4500)Our goal is to continue representing Bitcoin Cash positively by having a physical preference in Bitcoin and crypto spaces.This year Kallisti plans on attending 4 major conferences to maximize BCH exposure and related networking opportunities.- BCH BLISS: $1800 - Ticket: Already accounted for by Selene sponsorship of the event - Air Travel: ~$1200 (1 passenger, economy, round trip) - Hotel: ~$600 (at venue, 4 nights)- BTC Las Vegas: $1200 - Ticket: Free Open Source Pass - Air Travel: ~$200 (1 passenger, economy, round trip) - Hotel: ~$1000 (near venue, 5 nights)- Consensus Miami: $1500 - Ticket: ~$300 (Early Bird "Pro" Pass) - Air Travel: ~$700 (1 passenger, economy, from Vegas, to Miami, to Home) - Hotel: ~$500 (near venue, 4 nights)- Libertarian National Convention: $1000 - The bi-annual gathering of the US Libertarian Party will be held in Kallisti's hometown from May 21-25. - Exhibition Booth: $500 - Booth Promotional Materials: $500Monetization StrategiesFrom the beginning, we've known that surviving on community fundraisers indefinitely is not viable. The wallet itself is critical infrastructure, but now that it is relatively mature we can focus our attention onto further product and brand development.We already have **three** marginally revenue-generating products:- Bchat: The "secret project" mentioned in the 2025 FundMe - our attempt at "decentralized social media". We launched a proof of concept that we consider successful. Community sentiment toward the product was positive despite its "alpha" status. With only a small percentage of the transaction volume captured by Selene, the early alpha was generating approximately $2-3 USD in daily revenue. Bchat is revolutionary in that it allows end users to get monetized directly for their content with very little friction, unlike traditional social media platforms. We believe that the monetization feedback loop will be a persistent growth driver for the product, mitigating the problems that come with attempting to bootstrap a new social media network.- BCH.ninja infrastructure provisioning: we have proof of product-market fit from a trial run of BCH-denominated VPS provisioning services. Further development of BCH.ninja infrastructure will allow us to expand this line of business.- Dance.cash: originally developed via BLAZE hackathon bounty, we recently launched an events/ticketing platform that caters to the rather large Bachata dance community. We have an ongoing partnership with Alex from BOH Studio, UK, who is the host of the Bachata classes at BCH BLISS. Initial uptake of dance.cash is promising: 50 users have registered for the first hosted event within a week.We also have two wallet features in development that we speculate will enable revenue that scales with user growth:- Stablecoin Mode: we can take a marginal percentage on swap fees - "Donation Mode": opt-in, configurable micropayments to Selene team or other entities (such as Electrum server providers)In addition, we're working on positioning Selene partially as a "crypto culture and lifestyle" brand for additional marketing exposure and sales. This mostly involves merchandise and media that can be sold on our website, at conferences, and through other marketing initiatives such as the 00TATTS campaign.- Merchandise to be sold through Web Store: - T-Shirts - Hoodies - Hats - Stickers - Keychains - QR keychains - NFC keychains - NFC Backup CardsOther options such as releasing a NFT collection are also on the table.Finally, we anticipate future development of BCH-native business-focused products catering to functions like accounting, payroll, and inventory management to be potentially lucrative for business-to-business sales. 2026 Roadmap & DeliverablesIn the next 12 months, we are targeting the following hard deliverables:- CashFusion- Shareable Link- Continued BChat & website development- Continued Dance.cash development- Static payment identity (e.g. RPA, @handle)- Stats Dashboard- Exchange rates for all global fiat currenciesWe are also opportunistically targeting:- Further dApp integration & ecosystem support (Cauldron, XO Stack, Quantumroot, etc)- More in-app tools/utilities- UI/Design improvements- Merchant map integrations- eCommerce & business-focused products (e.g. payroll, accounting, inventory)Progress Tracking and FeedbackOur GitLab milestone and issue trackers can be used to follow our progress:- Development board: https://git.xulu.tech/selene.cash/selene-wallet/-/boards/2- Feedback board: https://git.xulu.tech/selene.cash/selene-wallet/-/boards/4- Issue tracker: https://git.xulu.tech/selene.cash/selene-wallet/-/issues/- Milestone tracker: https://git.xulu.tech/selene.cash/selene-wallet/-/milestonesUpdates will always be published to our Twitter: https://twitter.com/SeleneWalletIf you’d like to share your thoughts about Selene Wallet with us, send an email to feedback@selene.cash or talk to us on Telegram at https://t.me/SeleneWallet!Try Selene Wallet Today!- Website: https://selene.cash- Web Wallet: https://app.selene.cash- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=cash.selene.app)- [Apple App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/selene-wallet-bitcoin-cash/id6449441422?platform=iphone)- [Direct Android APK Download](https://selene.cash/download/apk)- BChat: https://bchat.cashSpecial ThanksWe'd like to extend our appreciation and gratitude to the BCH community for supporting us and enjoying Selene Wallet. In addition, we'd specifically like to thank a few people for their contributions in 2025:- Jim Hamill- Mateus Dal Bianco- Mathieu Geukens- Dagur Valberg- Hossein Zoda- Kavin- Steve Thurmond- McClarty Films- Jett Scythe- Ian Blas- Alex BOH- 00TATT$- MiggyCryptoX- Kenn Bosak- Charlie Spears- James O'Beirne- FiendishCrypto- Duncanomics- Luned Whelan- Melroy Van Den Berg

title: Cash Privacy on Bitcoin Cash
description: # Bring Cash-Like Privacy to Bitcoin CashMost crypto payments still expose too much. They can reveal who paid, who received, and how much was sent. That is not how cash works.This project is about changing that for Bitcoin Cash.**The protocol is designed to shield both identity and payment amount. The public BCH transaction does not reveal the real amount being transferred. Instead, the visible on-chain BCH amount is only the fee required to move the private payment system forward. The real private value is carried inside the protocol’s protected state, not exposed in the public transaction amount.**That is the core breakthrough this phase is building toward.This is not just about making transactions harder to follow. It is about building a private payment system where the public chain no longer tells the full story. The goal is cash-like privacy on BCH: self-custodied, on-chain, auditable, and not dependent on a trusted middleman.## Why this is technically importantThis work is not a cosmetic privacy layer. It is aimed at solving several hard technical problems at once:- **actual zero knowledge**, not “privacy-shaped” masking that still leaks critical information- **succinct proofs under 100 KB**, so private payments remain practical for real wallets and users- an **off-chain prover**, so heavy proving work happens client-side rather than on-chain- an **on-chain verifier**, so BCH itself enforces the payment rules without trusting an external service- a **post-quantum direction**, moving the security model away from ordinary signing keys and toward proof-based authorization that is more resistant to long-term quantum riskTogether, these properties move BCH toward a much stronger privacy model than ordinary transparent transactions can offer.## What makes this differentMost blockchain payments rely directly on ordinary signing keys. That creates two problems:- transaction details remain too visible- long-term security still depends heavily on conventional signature exposureThis protocol takes a different path.Instead of using the public transaction to reveal the true payment amount and ordinary transaction flow, it moves the meaningful private payment state into a protected protocol layer. The public chain mainly carries the cost of advancing that state. The actual authorization and consistency checks are enforced by cryptographic proofs and on-chain verification logic.That means the system is designed to:- hide who paid whom- hide how much was paid- reduce dependence on exposed signing-key-based transaction meaning- move toward a more quantum-resilient privacy architecture over time## A key piece of the designA major part of this phase is the move to a **128-byte token commitment format** for the live payment path.In simple terms, that commitment acts as the compact on-chain carrier for the protected payment state. It is what allows the public BCH transaction to carry forward the private system without exposing the real payment amount directly in the visible BCH output value.This matters because it turns privacy from a loose wallet convention into something the chain can actually enforce and verify.## What supporters are fundingSupporters are funding the step from “privacy prototype” to “real private payment foundation for BCH.”That means funding work to:- harden the private payment path- publish a privacy-first reference wallet and CLI- validate the design with live transactions- prove that BCH can carry private payments without exposing the true payment amount publicly- demonstrate the new protected commitment path on-chain- prepare the ground for a later aggregation and privacy market layer built on top of a real self-sovereign base protocol## What this phase is notThis is not yet the final consumer wallet. This is not yet the final large-scale aggregation layer. This is not a custodial shortcut. This is not fake privacy built on hidden trust.It is the protocol-first foundation that must exist before a larger privacy ecosystem can honestly be built.## DeliverablesThis phase is complete when supporters can verify:- a privacy-first wallet can be initialized and funded- the protocol carries private value without exposing the true payment amount publicly- the live payment path uses the intended protected commitment format- the payment flow works on-chain- the code and evidence are published so others can inspect and reproduce the results- the system demonstrates a real zero-knowledge, proof-verified path rather than a privacy-themed wrapper## Why fund this nowThis is the point where the project moves from scaffolding into a real privacy protocol path.Until now, the work has advanced on Chipnet, where the protocol, wallet flow, and on-chain behavior could be developed and tested in public. This phase is about carrying that work forward into a form that is not just testable, but suitable to keep advancing toward Mainnet.The technical foundation now exists to stop talking about private BCH in the abstract and start proving it in a form that people can run, inspect, and build on.Funding this phase helps turn BCH privacy from a promising idea into a live, verifiable system:- shielded identity- shielded amounts- succinct proofs- on-chain enforcement- a path toward stronger post-quantum resilience

title: Please help my mother with her cataract surgery!
description: I am writing this post with many mixed feelings: on one hand, I feel uneasy being in this position of asking for support, but on the other, we cannot allow more time to pass and risk my mother going completely blind.Every day, she reminds me how she can practically no longer see with her left eye; with it, she can only recognize my shadow. Her right eye is heading down the same path as the left.My precious woman, my example.My mother is the second of 10 siblings from a peasant marriage. She was born and spent her childhood in the oil fields of "Mene Grande" in Zulia State. My grandfather worked there as a laborer while my grandmother cared for the children. After having seven children, they decided to move to Barquisimeto, Lara State.My grandfather worked for a time at the sugar refinery, while my grandmother began working as a laborer at a school near their home. During that time, my eldest uncle studied and played baseball, while my mother only studied and helped my grandmother care for the younger siblings (eventually 6 girls and 4 boys).Of all the siblings, my mother is the one with a reserved, conciliatory, and advisory character—how could she not be, after being the guide alongside my grandparents? She was the one my grandparents demanded the most from: she excelled in her studies, never went out to parties, and didn't have a boyfriend until she was an adult. Although she entered the Polytechnic University, she couldn't graduate because, at that time, there were many protests for educational reform.One day, she learned about the scholarship-based technical courses offered by the CANTV (National Telephone Company of Venezuela). Along with several classmates, she went to the capital, completed the Communications Technician course, and they were hired by CANTV almost immediately. She did not return to her university studies; instead, she spent 30 years building the landline and internet telecommunications network of central-western Venezuela. As a technician and project designer, she had to create blueprints and travel constantly to supervise company projects. Today, this is the infrastructure that keeps the country connected, and she was a protagonist in its creation.With her effort and dedication, she managed to raise my brother and me and help my grandparents. She gave us a roof over our heads where we never lacked anything; she didn't have a man by her side, but she had her family. All my admiration goes to my mother, who has always been an example of perseverance and hard work, as well as a woman of great spiritual strength and temperance.Medical situation.Following her retirement, she was able to live off her severance benefits (today in Venezuela, social benefits are non-existent) until the country entered a deeper crisis in 2014. The company could no longer sustain the insurance for retirees, and public services decayed to the point of being non-existent, so she stopped attending regular routine medical consultations.She has several diagnoses resulting from years of work and age: herniated discs, hypothyroidism, and recently, venous insufficiency and hypertension. Also, due to her thyroid issues and age, her teeth have deteriorated, and she needs a prosthesis soon. However, the urgent and important matter is cataract surgery.In September of last year, the diagnosis was precise: Cataract Surgery. Both eyes are affected. The right eye is in a "mature" state and the left eye is "hypermature." Her vision worsens every day and it is unavoidable; as time passes, the white in her pupils becomes more and more noticeable. Although she sometimes tries to hide the fact that she can practically no longer see out of her left eye just to avoid worrying us, it can no longer be hidden.We have tried the channels provided by the State for these cases, but the truth is the process is very disheartening. The only way to obtain this type of surgery covered by the State is through a mobile or web application called VENAPP. It is an application for all types of requests for government programs, but we have already gone through this process and only received one call to say the request was received—that was in November of last year. The insurance from the company she dedicated 30 years of her life to no longer covers specialized consultations, only general ones and some emergencies. My brother and I only earn enough to cover essential household expenses and my mother's basic medicines.For all the above reasons—and practical ones such as low fees, immediacy, privacy, and the good faith of the BCH community—we hopefully request your support to cover the costs of the surgery for both eyes and the post-operative treatment. This year is very important for us to ensure my mother's vision is perfect; she will turn 70 years old this year, and with this surgery, her life will be much fuller and more manageable.Budget and Goal.In our search for good options, we found one of the best ophthalmologists in our city, Dr. Fahir Duran. Dr. Duran has a package that includes:Johnson & Johnson monofocal intraocular lensOphthalmological supplies for the surgeryMedical feesClinic expensesFirst post-operative consultationTotal for one eye: $1,850We would also need:Transportation expenses: $100Post-operative supplies: $500Pre and post-operative consultations ($85 x 4): $340Thus, it would be $2,790 per eye, making our total goal $5,600 (approximately 12.8 BCH). This is the goal to obtain sufficient resources to carry out the surgery on both of my mother's eyes over a period of 4 to 6 months; this is because one eye is operated on first and then the other, with a typical rest period of 1 to 2 months between surgeries.Finally, it is quite difficult for me to be in this situation with my mother, the being I love most in my entire life. She has voluntarily told me to look for a way to help her with her visual health. I have great hopes of reaching the set goal. The entire process will be properly documented and published. I want to thank in advance each and every person who supports my mother in this process and for making her life better.Thank you very much.P.S. I will leave each of the images here for medical and budget details.My X: Cryptobakeryve

title: 🟢 BCH ACCEPTED HERE
description: 🟢 BCH ACCEPTED HERE — YOLA, NIGERIA Reviving Real-World Bitcoin Cash Adoption, One Merchant at a TimeIn the early days of Bitcoin Cash, one simple sign created excitement everywhere:"Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here."Across communities, businesses proudly accepted BCH, and people could walk in, pay with crypto, and experience true peer-to-peer electronic cash in real life.Today, with better tools, stronger awareness, and growing openness toward crypto — the time is right to bring that energy back. And scale it. ⚡✅ WHAT WE'VE ALREADY DONE — C LOUNGE ACTIVATIONWe didn't start with a pitch. We started with action.Our first BCH merchant activation at C Lounge, Yola proved the model works:📲 New users installed wallets and learned by doing 💸 Real BCH payments were made for games and drinks 🎟️ BCH was distributed to participants via CashStamps 🏪 C Lounge was fully onboarded as a BCH merchant 📍 C Lounge is now live and listed on Paytaca MapsThis wasn't a demo. This was live, peer-to-peer economic activity — powered by BCH, happening in Nigeria. 🇳🇬🚀 NEXT: AREWA CRAVE ACTIVATION 🍟🥤Building on what we proved at C Lounge, we are now expanding to Arewa Crave — a youth-focused food and lifestyle spot serving chips, milkshakes, slush, and more.During this activation we will:🧑‍💻 Introduce Bitcoin Cash to new users and nearby businesses 📲 Help participants install and set up BCH wallets 🍟 Enable real BCH payments for food and drinks 🎟️ Distribute BCH via CashStamps 🏪 Onboard Arewa Crave as an active BCH merchant 📍 List Arewa Crave on Paytaca Maps 📣 Amplify the story through content, media, and community updates🔁 BEYOND THE EVENT — SUSTAINABLE ADOPTIONThis campaign goes beyond a one-day meetup. We are building lasting merchant infrastructure:🟢 "Bitcoin Cash Accepted Here" stickers and payment signage 🎁 BCH swag, pins, and educational materials 📲 Staff and customer onboarding resources 💸 Spending incentives to encourage repeated BCH usage 📸 Photos, videos, and community documentation at every stepAll locations are intentionally youth-focused — where digital payments spread fastest and network effects are strongest.💡 WHY THIS MATTERSBitcoin Cash is designed to be peer-to-peer electronic cash for the world.Adoption happens when: ✔️ People use it ✔️ Businesses accept it ✔️ Transactions become normalBy activating real businesses and enabling real payments, we bring BCH back into everyday life — where it belongs.💰 FUNDING GOAL: 1.5 BCHThis phase will fund the full Arewa Crave activation, including:🎟️ CashStamp BCH onboarding and distribution 🏪 Merchant integration and Paytaca Maps listing 🗂️ Event coordination and logistics 🟢 BCH branding materials and signage 🎁 Swag, educational resources, and spending incentives 📸 Full documentation — photos, videos, community updates🔚 CLOSINGWe've already validated the model at C Lounge.Now we scale it to Arewa Crave — and beyond.📍 From onboarding → to real transactions → to merchant adoption. One location at a time. One community at a time.Help us make Bitcoin Cash real in Yola. 🇳🇬🟢⚡
